# Financial household management app architecture - Claude

**Geëxporteerd:** 5-1-2026, 10:50:50
**Aantal berichten:** 438

---
**Claude:**

| Element | Foreground | Background | Ratio | Pass |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Body text | #1C1C1E (near black) | #F5F5F7 (light grey) | 16.4:1 | ✅ |
| Primary button | #FFFFFF (white) | #007AFF (blue) | 4.5:1 | ✅ |
| Secondary text | #6E6E73 (grey) | #F5F5F7 (light grey) | 4.6:1 | ✅ |
| Error text | #FF3B30 (red) | #FFFFFF (white) | 5.3:1 | ✅ |
| Success KPI | #34C759 (green) | #FFFFFF (white) | 3.2:1 | ✅ (large text) |
| Warning KPI |  |  |  |  |

| Feature | Traditional Approach | This Architecture | Time Saved |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Add 50+ fields | 2-3 days (write components) | 4-6 hours (edit config) | 70% |
| Dynamic multi-person sections | 3-4 days (build logic) | 4-6 hours (enhance DynamicSection) | 75% |
| Complex conditional logic | 2-3 days (scattered if/else) | 6-8 hours (extend ConditionalField) | 60% |
| Add 10 validation rules | 1-2 days (per-field logic) | 3-4 hours (add to validation.js) | 80% |
| Real n8n integration | 1-2 days (API setup) | 4-6 hours (swap mock functions) | 50% |
| TOTAL | ~2-3 weeks | ~3-4 days | ~70% |

| # | Verbetering | Mijn Oordeel | Prioriteit |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Star import React | ✅ Volledig eens | HIGH |
| 2 | Context typed | ✅ Volledig eens | HIGH |
| 3a | WizardPage deps | ✅ Eens | HIGH |
| 3b | LandingScreen deps | ✅ Eens | HIGH |
| 3c | DashboardScreen deps | ❌ Niet eens (infinite loop risk) | HIGH |
| 4 | Index signatures local state | ✅ Volledig eens | HIGH |
| 5 | Storage type fixes | ✅ Volledig eens | HIGH |
| 6 | loadAllFormData typing | ✅ Volledig eens | MEDIUM |
| 7 | Conditional safe indexing | ✅ Volledig eens | MEDIUM |
| 8 | Validation typed | ✅ Volledig eens | HIGH |
| 9 | Effect dependencies | Zie 3a/3b/3c | HIGH |
| 10 | Reducer merge note | ℹ️ Akkoord, document | LOW |
| 11 | Native select (NOT applied) | ✅ Correct besluit | FUTURE |
| 12 | Housekeeping | ✅ Eens | LOW |

| Fout | Lijn | Oorzaak | Aanbevolen Fix | Prioriteit |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | 525-538 | Web HTML in React Native context | Custom JSX namespace declaration | HIGH |
| 2 | 617, 770, 787, 800, 817 | key prop niet in interface | Use React.FC<Props> | MEDIUM |
| 3 | 933 | Missing state dependency | Use useMemo for sync calculation | HIGH |
| 4 | 1403 | Missing children (structure error) | Verify <App /> inside <FormProvider> | CRITICAL |

| Oplossing | Werkt Web | Werkt Native | Effort | Production Ready | Recommended |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| A: Platform.select + error | ✅ | ⚠️ (shows error) | 5 min | ❌ | Phase 1 POC |
| B: @react-native-picker/picker | ✅ | ✅ | 30 min | ✅ | YES ⭐ |
| C: Custom Modal | ✅ | ✅ | 2 hours | ✅ | Advanced |
| D: Platform files | ✅ | ✅ | 1 hour | ✅ | Large apps |

| Fout | Oorzaak | Impact | Recommended Fix | Effort |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| #1: key prop | React.FC includes children but NOT key | Type error | Extend React.Attributes | 5 min |
| #2: option crash | HTML elements don't exist in React Native | App crashes on native | Platform.select (POC) or @react-native-picker/picker (Prod) | 5-30 min |

| Issue | Cause | Fix | Priority |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Unused style warning | ESLint false positive | Add comment or remove if using chips | LOW |
| Missing children | ConditionalField expects children but config doesn't provide | Add children JSX in map | HIGH |
| Invariant Violation | Unknown - need exact error location | Clear cache + use chips | CRITICAL |
| Web-first design | Not mobile-friendly | Use horizontal chip buttons | HIGH |

| Type | Purpose | Implementation Effort |
| --- | --- | --- |
| calculated-display | Show read-only calculated value | MEDIUM (3h) |
| multi-checkbox | Multiple selection checkboxes | MEDIUM (4h |

```
User visits C1 page
  ↓
WizardPage receives pageId="C1"
  ↓
WizardPage loads formConfig.C1
  ↓
Maps over formConfig.C1.fields array
  ↓
Each field object → FormField component
  ↓
FormField reads field.type → renders appropriate input
  ↓
FormField reads field.validation → applies rules
  ↓
All automatic, zero custom code per field
```

Each field object → FormField component
  ↓
FormField reads field.type → renders appropriate input
  ↓
FormField reads field.validation → applies rules
  ↓
All automatic, zero custom code per field
```

```sql
// Enhanced field definition
{
  id: 'kinderopvang',
  label: 'Kosten kinderopvang (€)',
  type: 'numeric',
  required: false,
  conditional: {
    type: 'AND', // New: support AND/OR logic
    conditions: [
      { field: 'C1.aantalKinderen', operator: '>', value: 0 },
      { field: 'C1.werkzaam', operator: '===', value: true }
    ]
  }
}

| return condition.conditions.every(c => evaluateSingleCondition(c)) |  |
| --- | --- |
| return condition.conditions.some(c => evaluateSingleCondition(c)) |  |
| return evaluateSingleCondition(condition) |  |
| } |  |

const evaluateSingleCondition = (cond) => {
  const fieldPath = cond.field.split('.');
  let value = formData;
  
  for (const key of fieldPath) {
    value = value?.[key];
    if (value === undefined) return false;
  }
  
  switch (cond.operator) {
    case '>': return value > cond.value;
    case '<': return value < cond.value;
    case '===': return value === cond.value;
    case '!==': return value !== cond.value;
    default: return false;
  }
};
```

```js
// Enhanced field definition
{
  id: 'kinderopvang',
  label: 'Kosten kinderopvang (€)',
  type: 'numeric',
  required: false,
  conditional: {
    type: 'AND', // New: support AND/OR logic
    conditions: [
      { field: 'C1.aantalKinderen', operator: '>', value: 0 },
      { field: 'C1.werkzaam', operator: '===', value: true }
    ]
  }
}

| return condition.conditions.every(c => evaluateSingleCondition(c)) |  |
| --- | --- |
| return condition.conditions.some(c => evaluateSingleCondition(c)) |  |
| return evaluateSingleCondition(condition) |  |
| } |  |

const evaluateSingleCondition = (cond) => {
  const fieldPath = cond.field.split('.');
  let value = formData;
  
  for (const key of fieldPath) {
    value = value?.[key];
    if (value === undefined) return false;
  }
  
  switch (cond.operator) {
    case '>': return value > cond.value;
    case '<': return value < cond.value;
    case '===': return value === cond.value;
    case '!==': return value !== cond.value;
    default: return false;
  }
};
```

```html
// Current implementation (lines 650-668) shows static section
// Enhanced version for Phase 2:

const DynamicSection = ({ sectionTemplate, count, formData, pageData, onFieldChange, errors }) => {
  return (
    <>
      {Array.from({ length: count }, (_, index) => {
        const sectionId = `${sectionTemplate.id}${index + 1}`;
        const sectionTitle = `${sectionTemplate.titleBase} ${index + 1}`;
        
        return (
          <View key={sectionId} style={styles.section}>
            <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>{sectionTitle}</Text>
            {sectionTemplate.fields.map(field => {
              // Create unique field ID: "nettoMaandsalaris1", "nettoMaandsalaris2", etc.
              const uniqueFieldId = `${field.id}${index + 1}`;
              const uniqueField = { ...field, id: uniqueFieldId };
              
              return (
                <FormField
                  key={uniqueFieldId}
                  field={uniqueField}
                  value={pageData[uniqueFieldId]}
                  onChange={onFieldChange}
                  error={errors[uniqueFieldId]}
                  formData={formData}
                />
              );
            })}
          </View>
        );
      })}
    </>
  );
};
```

```js
// Current implementation (lines 650-668) shows static section
// Enhanced version for Phase 2:

const DynamicSection = ({ sectionTemplate, count, formData, pageData, onFieldChange, errors }) => {
  return (
    <>
      {Array.from({ length: count }, (_, index) => {
        const sectionId = `${sectionTemplate.id}${index + 1}`;
        const sectionTitle = `${sectionTemplate.titleBase} ${index + 1}`;
        
        return (
          <View key={sectionId} style={styles.section}>
            <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>{sectionTitle}</Text>
            {sectionTemplate.fields.map(field => {
              // Create unique field ID: "nettoMaandsalaris1", "nettoMaandsalaris2", etc.
              const uniqueFieldId = `${field.id}${index + 1}`;
              const uniqueField = { ...field, id: uniqueFieldId };
              
              return (
                <FormField
                  key={uniqueFieldId}
                  field={uniqueField}
                  value={pageData[uniqueFieldId]}
                  onChange={onFieldChange}
                  error={errors[uniqueFieldId]}
                  formData={formData}
                />
              );
            })}
          </View>
        );
      })}
    </>
  );
};
```

```json
{
  field: {
    id: string;              // Unique field identifier
    label: string;           // Display label
    type: 'text' | 'numeric' | 'select' | 'toggle' | 'date';
    required?: boolean;      // Is field mandatory?
    validation?: {           // Validation rules
      min?: number;
      max?: number;
      postcode?: boolean;
      email?: boolean;
      // Add custom rules here
    };
    defaultValue?: any;      // Pre-filled value
    placeholder?: string;    // Input hint text
    labelDynamic?: boolean;  // Calculate label at runtime
    options?: Array<{        // For select type
      label: string;
      value: string;
    }>;
  };
  value: any;                // Current field value
  onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void;
  error: string | null;      // Validation error message
  formData: object;          // Full form state (for dynamic labels)
}
```

```ts
{
  field: {
    id: string;              // Unique field identifier
    label: string;           // Display label
    type: 'text' | 'numeric' | 'select' | 'toggle' | 'date';
    required?: boolean;      // Is field mandatory?
    validation?: {           // Validation rules
      min?: number;
      max?: number;
      postcode?: boolean;
      email?: boolean;
      // Add custom rules here
    };
    defaultValue?: any;      // Pre-filled value
    placeholder?: string;    // Input hint text
    labelDynamic?: boolean;  // Calculate label at runtime
    options?: Array<{        // For select type
      label: string;
      value: string;
    }>;
  };
  value: any;                // Current field value
  onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void;
  error: string | null;      // Validation error message
  formData: object;          // Full form state (for dynamic labels)
}
```

```html
<FormField
  field={{
    id: 'nettoMaandsalaris',
    label: 'Netto maandsalaris (€)',
    type: 'numeric',
    required: true,
    validation: { min: 0, max: 10000 },
    placeholder: '0'
  }}
  value={pageData.nettoMaandsalaris}
  onChange={(id, val) => setPageData({ ...pageData, [id]: val })}
  error={errors.nettoMaandsalaris}
  formData={state}
/>

```json
{
  condition: {
    field: string;           // Field path (e.g., "C1.aantalKinderen")
    operator: '>' | '<' | '>=' | '<=' | '===' | '!==';
    value: any;              // Comparison value
    // Phase 2: Add type: 'AND' | 'OR', conditions: []
  };
  formData: object;          // Full form state to evaluate against
  children: React.ReactNode; // Content to conditionally render
}

```json
{
  section: {
    id: string;              // Base section ID
    title: string;           // Section display title
    fields: Array<FieldConfig>; // Field definitions
    // Phase 2: Add titleBase, countBasedOn
  };
  formData: object;          // Full form state
  pageData: object;          // Current page data
  onFieldChange: (id: string, value: any) => void;
  errors: object;            // Field errors
}
```

```ts
{
  section: {
    id: string;              // Base section ID
    title: string;           // Section display title
    fields: Array<FieldConfig>; // Field definitions
    // Phase 2: Add titleBase, countBasedOn
  };
  formData: object;          // Full form state
  pageData: object;          // Current page data
  onFieldChange: (id: string, value: any) => void;
  errors: object;            // Field errors
}
```

```html
// Usage:
<DynamicSection
  sectionTemplate={{
    id: 'volwassene',
    titleBase: 'Volwassene',
    countBasedOn: 'C1.aantalVolwassenen',
    fields: [/* field configs */]
  }}
  count={state.C1?.aantalVolwassenen || 1}
  formData={state}
  pageData={pageData}
  onFieldChange={handleFieldChange}
  errors={errors}
/>

// Renders:
// - "Volwassene 1" section with fields nettoMaandsalaris1, etc.
// - "Volwassene 2" section with fields nettoMaandsalaris2, etc.
// - ... for N sections
```

```js
// Usage:
<DynamicSection
  sectionTemplate={{
    id: 'volwassene',
    titleBase: 'Volwassene',
    countBasedOn: 'C1.aantalVolwassenen',
    fields: [/* field configs */]
  }}
  count={state.C1?.aantalVolwassenen || 1}
  formData={state}
  pageData={pageData}
  onFieldChange={handleFieldChange}
  errors={errors}
/>

// Renders:
// - "Volwassene 1" section with fields nettoMaandsalaris1, etc.
// - "Volwassene 2" section with fields nettoMaandsalaris2, etc.
// - ... for N sections
```

```
{
  pageId: 'C1' | 'C4' | 'C7' | 'C10'; // Page identifier
  onNext: () => void;                  // Forward navigation callback
  onBack: () => void;                  // Backward navigation callback
  loading: boolean;                    // Show loading spinner during API calls
}
```

**Responsibilities**:

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| 1. **Data Loading** | On mount, loads saved data from AsyncStorage |
| 2. **Field Rendering** | Maps over formConfig[pageId].fields and renders FormField components |
| 3. **Conditional Rendering** | Wraps conditional fields in ConditionalField |
| 4. **Validation** | Validates all required fields before enabling "Verder" button |
| 5. **State Updates** | Dispatches field changes to global state + local state |
| 6. **Persistence** | Saves page data to AsyncStorage on navigation |
| 7. **Progress Indicator** | Shows "Stap X van Y" at top |
| 8. **Button States** | Disables "Verder" if validation fails or loading active |

**Validation Flow**:
```
User clicks "Verder"
  ↓
validatePage() called
  ↓
For each field in config:
  - Check if field is conditionally rendered (skip if hidden)
  - Run validateField(field, value)
  - Collect errors
  ↓
If any errors:
  - Show error messages below fields
  - Keep "Verder" button disabled
  - Don't navigate
Else:
  - Save page data to AsyncStorage
  - Call onNext() callback
  - Navigate to next page
```

```ts
{
  pageId: 'C1' | 'C4' | 'C7' | 'C10'; // Page identifier
  onNext: () => void;                  // Forward navigation callback
  onBack: () => void;                  // Backward navigation callback
  loading: boolean;                    // Show loading spinner during API calls
}
```

**Responsibilities**:

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| 1. **Data Loading** | On mount, loads saved data from AsyncStorage |
| 2. **Field Rendering** | Maps over formConfig[pageId].fields and renders FormField components |
| 3. **Conditional Rendering** | Wraps conditional fields in ConditionalField |
| 4. **Validation** | Validates all required fields before enabling "Verder" button |
| 5. **State Updates** | Dispatches field changes to global state + local state |
| 6. **Persistence** | Saves page data to AsyncStorage on navigation |
| 7. **Progress Indicator** | Shows "Stap X van Y" at top |
| 8. **Button States** | Disables "Verder" if validation fails or loading active |

**Validation Flow**:
```
User clicks "Verder"
  ↓
validatePage() called
  ↓
For each field in config:
  - Check if field is conditionally rendered (skip if hidden)
  - Run validateField(field, value)
  - Collect errors
  ↓
If any errors:
  - Show error messages below fields
  - Keep "Verder" button disabled
  - Don't navigate
Else:
  - Save page data to AsyncStorage
  - Call onNext() callback
  - Navigate to next page
```

```
// BEFORE (Phase 1 - Mock):
if (mockCall === 'P3') {
  result = await mockN8n.callP3(state);
  await saveUserId(result.userId);
  dispatch({ type: 'SET_USER_ID', userId: result.userId });
}

// AFTER (Phase 2 - Real n8n):
if (mockCall === 'P3') {
  const response = await fetch('https://your-n8n-webhook.com/p3-household', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({
      household: {
        adults: state.C1.aantalVolwassenen,
        children: state.C1.aantalKinderen,
        housingType: state.C1.woonsituatie,
        postcode: state.C4.postcode
      }
    })
  });
  
  result = await response.json();
  await saveUserId(result.userId);
  dispatch({ type: 'SET_USER_ID', userId: result.userId });
}
```

```js
// BEFORE (Phase 1 - Mock):
if (mockCall === 'P3') {
  result = await mockN8n.callP3(state);
  await saveUserId(result.userId);
  dispatch({ type: 'SET_USER_ID', userId: result.userId });
}

// AFTER (Phase 2 - Real n8n):
if (mockCall === 'P3') {
  const response = await fetch('https://your-n8n-webhook.com/p3-household', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({
      household: {
        adults: state.C1.aantalVolwassenen,
        children: state.C1.aantalKinderen,
        housingType: state.C1.woonsituatie,
        postcode: state.C4.postcode
      }
    })
  });
  
  result = await response.json();
  await saveUserId(result.userId);
  dispatch({ type: 'SET_USER_ID', userId: result.userId });
}
```

useState(...)
useEffect(...)

React.useState(...)

```js
// MIJN CODE:
const FormContext = createContext();
const useFormContext = () => {
  const context = useContext(FormContext);
  if (!context) throw new Error('...');
  return context;
};

// VERBETERDE CODE:
type FormAction = { type: string; [key: string]: any };
type FormState = Record<string, any>;
type FormContextValue = { 
  state: FormState; 
  dispatch: React.Dispatch<FormAction> 
};

const FormContext = React.createContext<FormContextValue | undefined>(undefined);
function useFormContext(): FormContextValue {
  const ctx = React.useContext(FormContext);
  if (!ctx) throw new Error('...');
  return ctx;
}
```

```js
// MIJN CODE:
const FormContext = createContext();
const useFormContext = () => {
  const context = useContext(FormContext);
  if (!context) throw new Error('...');
  return context;
};

// VERBETERDE CODE:
type FormAction = { type: string; [key: string]: any };
type FormState = Record<string, any>;
type FormContextValue = { 
  state: FormState; 
  dispatch: React.Dispatch<FormAction> 
};

const FormContext = React.createContext<FormContextValue | undefined>(undefined);
function useFormContext(): FormContextValue {
  const ctx = React.useContext(FormContext);
  if (!ctx) throw new Error('...');
  return ctx;
}
```

  loadData();
}, [pageId, config, dispatch]); // Complete dependencies

```
// Optie 1: Lege dependencies (mount-only)
useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  loadSummary();
}, []); // Runs only on mount

// Optie 2: Specifieke dependencies
useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  loadSummary();
}, [state.C7, state.C10]); // Only re-run if financial data changes
```

// MIJN CODE:
const loadAllFormData = async () => {
  const pages = ['C1', 'C4', 'C7', 'C10'];
  const allData = {};
  for (const pageId of pages) {
    const data = await loadPageData(pageId);
    if (data) allData[pageId] = data; // TS7053 error
  }
  return allData;
};

// VERBETERDE CODE:
const loadAllFormData = async (): Promise<Record<string, any> & { userId?: string }> => {
  const pages: Array<'C1'|'C4'|'C7'|'C10'> = ['C1','C4','C7','C10'];
  const allData: Record<string, any> = {};
  for (const pageId of pages) {
    const data: any | null = await loadPageData(pageId);
    if (data) allData[pageId] = data;
  }
  const userId: string | null = await getUserId();
  if (userId) allData.userId = userId;
  return allData;
};
```

```js
// MIJN CODE:
const loadAllFormData = async () => {
  const pages = ['C1', 'C4', 'C7', 'C10'];
  const allData = {};
  for (const pageId of pages) {
    const data = await loadPageData(pageId);
    if (data) allData[pageId] = data; // TS7053 error
  }
  return allData;
};

// VERBETERDE CODE:
const loadAllFormData = async (): Promise<Record<string, any> & { userId?: string }> => {
  const pages: Array<'C1'|'C4'|'C7'|'C10'> = ['C1','C4','C7','C10'];
  const allData: Record<string, any> = {};
  for (const pageId of pages) {
    const data: any | null = await loadPageData(pageId);
    if (data) allData[pageId] = data;
  }
  const userId: string | null = await getUserId();
  if (userId) allData.userId = userId;
  return allData;
};
```

```html
// MIJN CODE:
const evaluateCondition = () => {
  const fieldPath = condition.field.split('.');
  let value = formData;
  for (const key of fieldPath) {
    value = value?.[key]; // Implicitly any
    if (value === undefined) return false;
  }
};

// VERBETERDE CODE:
const evaluateCondition = () => {
  const fieldPath: string[] = condition.field.split('.');
  let value: any = formData;
  for (const key of fieldPath) {
    value = (value as Record<string, any>)?.[key]; // Safe cast
    if (value === undefined) return false;
  }
};
```

```js
// MIJN CODE:
const evaluateCondition = () => {
  const fieldPath = condition.field.split('.');
  let value = formData;
  for (const key of fieldPath) {
    value = value?.[key]; // Implicitly any
    if (value === undefined) return false;
  }
};

// VERBETERDE CODE:
const evaluateCondition = () => {
  const fieldPath: string[] = condition.field.split('.');
  let value: any = formData;
  for (const key of fieldPath) {
    value = (value as Record<string, any>)?.[key]; // Safe cast
    if (value === undefined) return false;
  }
};

  validation?: { min?: number; max?: number; postcode?: boolean };

| --- | --- |
| min: (value: number, min: number, fieldLabel: string): { valid: boolean; error: string | null } => { ... } |

const validateField = (field: FieldConfig, value: any): { valid: boolean; error: string | null } => { ... };

```yaml
fieldId: undefined

```sql
case 'SET_PAGE_DATA':
  // Option 1: Replace entire page (stricter)
  return {
    ...state,
    [action.pageId]: action.data // Full replacement
  };

// Option 2: Explicit clear support
case 'CLEAR_PAGE_FIELDS':
  const newPageData = { ...state[action.pageId] };
  action.fieldIds.forEach(id => delete newPageData[id]);
  return { ...state, [action.pageId]: newPageData };
```

```js
case 'SET_PAGE_DATA':
  // Option 1: Replace entire page (stricter)
  return {
    ...state,
    [action.pageId]: action.data // Full replacement
  };

// Option 2: Explicit clear support
case 'CLEAR_PAGE_FIELDS':
  const newPageData = { ...state[action.pageId] };
  action.fieldIds.forEach(id => delete newPageData[id]);
  return { ...state, [action.pageId]: newPageData };
```

```
// IN PLAATS VAN DE PATCH:
useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state); // ❌ state dependency
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  loadSummary();
}, [state]); // ❌ Re-runs te vaak

// GEBRUIK DIT:
useEffect(() => {
  const summaryData = {
    C7: state.C7,
    C10: state.C10,
    userId: state.userId
  };
  
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  
  loadSummary();
}, []); // ✅ Mount-only, of [state.C7, state.C10] voor re-calc on data change
```

```html
// Forceer TypeScript om HTML elements te accepteren
{field.type === 'select' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    {/* @ts-ignore - HTML select only works on web via react-native-web */}
    <select
      style={styles.select as any}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}
```

```ts
// Forceer TypeScript om HTML elements te accepteren
{field.type === 'select' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    {/* @ts-ignore - HTML select only works on web via react-native-web */}
    <select
      style={styles.select as any}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}
```

```
npm install --save-dev @types/react-native-web
```

npm install --save-dev @types/react-native-web
```

```
tsconfig.json
```

```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "types": ["react-native-web"]
  }
}
```

```js
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "types": ["react-native-web"]
  }
}
```

```html
// Voeg toe boven in bestand:
declare global {
  namespace JSX {
    interface IntrinsicElements {
      select: React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.SelectHTMLAttributes<HTMLSelectElement>, HTMLSelectElement>;
      option: React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.OptionHTMLAttributes<HTMLOptionElement>, HTMLOptionElement>;
    }
  }
}
```

```ts
// Voeg toe boven in bestand:
declare global {
  namespace JSX {
    interface IntrinsicElements {
      select: React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.SelectHTMLAttributes<HTMLSelectElement>, HTMLSelectElement>;
      option: React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.OptionHTMLAttributes<HTMLOptionElement>, HTMLOptionElement>;
    }
  }
}
```

```html
import { Platform } from 'react-native';

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS === 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select as any}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  // Use @react-native-picker/picker for native
  <Text>Native picker not implemented yet</Text>
)}
```

**AANBEVOLEN FIX: Optie C** (Custom types declaration)
- Minimalistische oplossing
- Documenteert web-only dependency
- Geen extra packages nodig

      style={styles.select as any}

      ))}

)}

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  // Use @react-native-picker/picker for native

)}

### **FOUT 3: React Hook useEffect missing dependency 'state' (Line 933)**

**Foutmelding:**
```
React Hook React.useEffect has a missing dependency: 'state'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps)
```

```
React.useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state); // state gebruikt
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  loadSummary();
}, []); // state ontbreekt in deps
```

```ts
React.useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state); // state gebruikt
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  loadSummary();
}, []); // state ontbreekt in deps
```

```
// Developer intent: Run ONCE on mount
React.useEffect(() => {
  const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state); // Uses initial state snapshot
}, []); // ⚠️ ESLint warns, but maybe intentional
```

```ts
// Developer intent: Run ONCE on mount
React.useEffect(() => {
  const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state); // Uses initial state snapshot
}, []); // ⚠️ ESLint warns, but maybe intentional
```

```
// User navigates: C1 → C4 → C7 → C10 → Dashboard
// Dashboard mounts with state = { C1: {...}, C4: {...}, C7: {...}, C10: {...} }
// Effect runs, calls P6 with complete state ✅

// LATER: User clicks "Terug" and changes C7 data
// Dashboard stays mounted, state updates to new values
// Effect DOESN'T re-run because deps = []
// Dashboard shows OLD calculation ❌
```

```ts
// User navigates: C1 → C4 → C7 → C10 → Dashboard
// Dashboard mounts with state = { C1: {...}, C4: {...}, C7: {...}, C10: {...} }
// Effect runs, calls P6 with complete state ✅

// LATER: User clicks "Terug" and changes C7 data
// Dashboard stays mounted, state updates to new values
// Effect DOESN'T re-run because deps = []
// Dashboard shows OLD calculation ❌
```

```
React.useEffect(() => {
  const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
  setSummary(result); // Updates local state
}, [state]); // state is object reference

// Object reference changes → Effect runs → setSummary → Parent re-renders
// → Dashboard re-mounts → state object recreated → Effect runs → Loop! 🔄
```

```ts
React.useEffect(() => {
  const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
  setSummary(result); // Updates local state
}, [state]); // state is object reference

// Object reference changes → Effect runs → setSummary → Parent re-renders
// → Dashboard re-mounts → state object recreated → Effect runs → Loop! 🔄
```

```
React.useEffect(() => {
  // Capture state at mount time
  const stateSnapshot = state;
  
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(stateSnapshot);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  
  loadSummary();
  // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
}, []); // Explicitly ignore warning, documented reason
```

```ts
React.useEffect(() => {
  // Capture state at mount time

    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(stateSnapshot);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };

  // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
}, []); // Explicitly ignore warning, documented reason
```

```
React.useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  
  loadSummary();
}, [state.C7, state.C10, state.userId]); // Only relevant data
```

```ts
React.useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  
  loadSummary();
}, [state.C7, state.C10, state.userId]); // Only relevant data
```

```
const summary = React.useMemo(() => {
  // Synchronous calculation, no async needed
  const inkomenTotaalMaand = 
    (state.C7?.nettoMaandsalaris || 0) + 
    (state.C7?.huurtoeslag || 0);
  
  const lastenTotaalVast = 
    (state.C10?.wonen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.energie || 0) +
    (state.C10?.verzekeringen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.abonnementen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.overig || 0);
  
  const cashflowNetto = inkomenTotaalMaand - lastenTotaalVast;
  
  return {
    inkomenTotaalMaand,
    lastenTotaalVast,
    cashflowNetto
  };
}, [state.C7, state.C10]); // Auto-recalculates when financial data changes
```

```ts
const summary = React.useMemo(() => {
  // Synchronous calculation, no async needed
  const inkomenTotaalMaand = 
    (state.C7?.nettoMaandsalaris || 0) + 
    (state.C7?.huurtoeslag || 0);
  
  const lastenTotaalVast = 
    (state.C10?.wonen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.energie || 0) +
    (state.C10?.verzekeringen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.abonnementen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.overig || 0);
  
  const cashflowNetto = inkomenTotaalMaand - lastenTotaalVast;
  
  return {
    inkomenTotaalMaand,
    lastenTotaalVast,
    cashflowNetto
  };
}, [state.C7, state.C10]); // Auto-recalculates when financial data changes
```

```js
const loadSummary = React.useCallback(async () => {
  const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
  setSummary(result.financialSummary);
}, [state]); // Memoized function

React.useEffect(() => {
  loadSummary();
}, [loadSummary]); // Stable reference
```

```ts
const loadSummary = React.useCallback(async () => {
  const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
  setSummary(result.financialSummary);
}, [state]); // Memoized function

React.useEffect(() => {
  loadSummary();
}, [loadSummary]); // Stable reference
```

```
const stateRef = React.useRef(state);

| stateRef.current = state | // Always current |
| --- | --- |
| }, [state]) |  |

React.useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(stateRef.current);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  
  loadSummary();
}, []); // Mount-only, but ref always current
```

**AANBEVOLEN FIX: Optie C** (useMemo)
- Mock P6 is synchronous calculation anyway
- No need for async/await and loading state
- Auto-updates when financial data changes
- Most performant and correct

**Als async echt nodig is: Optie B** (Specific deps)

```ts
export default function Root() {
  return (
    <FormProvider>
      <App />  {/* ✅ App is nu child van FormProvider */}
    </FormProvider>
  );
}
```

}

  // ❌ BAD: Provider without children is useless

```js
const FormProvider = ({ children }: React.PropsWithChildren) => {
  const [state, dispatch] = React.useReducer(formReducer, {} as FormState);
  
  return (
    <FormContext.Provider value={{ state, dispatch }}>
      {children}
    </FormContext.Provider>
  );
};

// Usage blijft hetzelfde
export default function Root() {
  return (
    <FormProvider>
      <App />
    </FormProvider>
  );
}
```

};

    <FormProvider>
      <App />
    </FormProvider>

}

```html
interface FormFieldProps extends React.Attributes {
  field: FieldConfig;
  value: any;
  onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void;
  error: string | null;
  formData: FormState;
}

const FormField: React.FC<FormFieldProps> = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }) => {
  // key is now in type but NOT in destructuring (React strips it)
}
```

```ts
interface FormFieldProps extends React.Attributes {
  field: FieldConfig;
  value: any;
  onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void;
  error: string | null;
  formData: FormState;
}

const FormField: React.FC<FormFieldProps> = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }) => {
  // key is now in type but NOT in destructuring (React strips it)
}
```

```
interface Attributes {
    key?: Key | null | undefined;
}
```

```ts
interface Attributes {
    key?: Key | null | undefined;
}
```

```html
// Create reusable helper type
type PropsWithKey<P> = P & React.Attributes;

| field: FieldConfig |  |
| --- | --- |
| value: any |  |
| onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void |  |
| error: string \| null |  |
| formData: FormState |  |

type FormFieldProps = PropsWithKey<FormFieldPropsBase>;

const FormField: React.FC<FormFieldProps> = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }) => {
  // ...
}
```

```ts
// Create reusable helper type
type PropsWithKey<P> = P & React.Attributes;

| field: FieldConfig |  |
| --- | --- |
| value: any |  |
| onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void |  |
| error: string \| null |  |
| formData: FormState |  |

type FormFieldProps = PropsWithKey<FormFieldPropsBase>;

const FormField: React.FC<FormFieldProps> = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }) => {
  // ...
}
```

```js
interface FormFieldProps {
  key?: React.Key; // Explicitly add
  field: FieldConfig;
  value: any;
  onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void;
  error: string | null;
  formData: FormState;
}
```

**Vergelijking:**

| Oplossing | Pro | Con | Recommended |
|-----------|-----|-----|-------------|
| A: Type assertion | Quick fix | Ugly, repetitive | ❌ |
| B: Extend Attributes | Clean, standard | Must extend each interface | ✅ **YES** |
| C: PropsWithKey helper | DRY, reusable | Extra abstraction | ✅ **BEST** |
| D: Manual key | Explicit | Manual, error-prone | ⚠️ OK |

### AANBEVOLEN FIX: **Optie B** (Extend React.Attributes)

Eenvoudig, standaard pattern, werkt voor alle components.

---

## **FOUT 2: View config getter callback for component `option` must be a function (Native Mobile)**

### Wat is het probleem?

**Foutmelding:**
```
View config getter callback for component `option` must be a function (received `undefined`). 
Make sure to start component names with a capital letter.
```

**Waar gebeurt dit?**
- ✅ **Werkt**: Expo web (browser)
- ❌ **Crasht**: Physical device via QR code

### Root Cause Analysis

**1. React Native vs React Native Web**

- Bron: [React Native Architecture](https://reactnative.dev/docs/intro-react-native-components)

**React Native (iOS/Android)**:
```
JavaScript Components → Native Bridge → UIKit/Android Views
```
- Heeft ALLEEN: `<View>`, `<Text>`, `<TextInput>`, `<ScrollView>`, etc.
- **GEEN HTML ELEMENTS**: `<div>`, `<select>`, `<option>`, `<span>`

**React Native Web**:
```
JavaScript Components → react-native-web → DOM (HTML)
```

```ts
interface FormFieldProps {
  key?: React.Key; // Explicitly add
  field: FieldConfig;
  value: any;
  onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void;
  error: string | null;
  formData: FormState;
}
```

**Vergelijking:**

| Oplossing | Pro | Con | Recommended |
|-----------|-----|-----|-------------|
| A: Type assertion | Quick fix | Ugly, repetitive | ❌ |
| B: Extend Attributes | Clean, standard | Must extend each interface | ✅ **YES** |
| C: PropsWithKey helper | DRY, reusable | Extra abstraction | ✅ **BEST** |
| D: Manual key | Explicit | Manual, error-prone | ⚠️ OK |

### AANBEVOLEN FIX: **Optie B** (Extend React.Attributes)

Eenvoudig, standaard pattern, werkt voor alle components.

---

## **FOUT 2: View config getter callback for component `option` must be a function (Native Mobile)**

### Wat is het probleem?

**Foutmelding:**
```
View config getter callback for component `option` must be a function (received `undefined`). 
Make sure to start component names with a capital letter.
```

**Waar gebeurt dit?**
- ✅ **Werkt**: Expo web (browser)
- ❌ **Crasht**: Physical device via QR code

### Root Cause Analysis

**1. React Native vs React Native Web**

- Bron: [React Native Architecture](https://reactnative.dev/docs/intro-react-native-components)

**React Native (iOS/Android)**:
```
JavaScript Components → Native Bridge → UIKit/Android Views
```
- Heeft ALLEEN: `<View>`, `<Text>`, `<TextInput>`, `<ScrollView>`, etc.
- **GEEN HTML ELEMENTS**: `<div>`, `<select>`, `<option>`, `<span>`

**React Native Web**:
```
JavaScript Components → react-native-web → DOM (HTML)
```

```js
{field.type === 'select' && (
  <View style={...}>
    <select>  {/* ❌ HTML element */}
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}
```

**Op Web**: ✅ Werkt
- Browser begrijpt native HTML `<select>` en `<option>`

**Op Native**: ❌ Crasht
- React Native zoekt `ViewConfig` voor component "option"
- ViewConfig = instructions hoe component moet renderen
- Bestaat alleen voor React Native components
- HTML elements hebben geen ViewConfig
- **Result**: `undefined` → Crash

**3. Error Message Breakdown**
```
View config getter callback for component `option` must be a function (received `undefined`)
```

```ts
{field.type === 'select' && (
  <View style={...}>
    <select>  {/* ❌ HTML element */}
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}
```

**Op Web**: ✅ Werkt
- Browser begrijpt native HTML `<select>` en `<option>`

**Op Native**: ❌ Crasht
- React Native zoekt `ViewConfig` voor component "option"
- ViewConfig = instructions hoe component moet renderen
- Bestaat alleen voor React Native components
- HTML elements hebben geen ViewConfig
- **Result**: `undefined` → Crash

**3. Error Message Breakdown**
```
View config getter callback for component `option` must be a function (received `undefined`)
```

```
import { Platform } from 'react-native';

if (Platform.OS === 'web') {
  // Use web-specific code
} else {
  // Use native code
}
```

```html
import { Platform } from 'react-native';

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS === 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  <View style={styles.fieldContainer}>
    <Text style={styles.fieldLabel}>
      {displayLabel} (Native picker not implemented yet)
    </Text>
    <Text style={styles.errorText}>
      Please use web version for now
    </Text>
  </View>
)}
```

)}

npx expo install @react-native-picker/picker
```

```html
import { Picker } from '@react-native-picker/picker';
import { Platform } from 'react-native';

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS === 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <Picker
      selectedValue={value || ''}
      onValueChange={(itemValue) => handleChange(itemValue)}
      style={styles.picker}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <Picker.Item key={opt.value} label={opt.label} value={opt.value} />
      ))}
    </Picker>
  </View>
)}
```

```ts
import { Picker } from '@react-native-picker/picker';
import { Platform } from 'react-native';

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS === 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>

)}

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <Picker
      selectedValue={value || ''}
      onValueChange={(itemValue) => handleChange(itemValue)}
      style={styles.picker}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <Picker.Item key={opt.value} label={opt.label} value={opt.value} />
      ))}
    </Picker>
  </View>
)}
```

```html
import { Modal, FlatList, Pressable } from 'react-native';

| const [modalVisible, setModalVisible] = React.useState(false) |  |
| --- | --- |
| const selectedOption = options?.find((opt: any) => opt.value === value) |  |
| onChange(item.value) |  |
| setModalVisible(false) |  |
| ) |  |
| } |  |

// Usage:
{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  <NativePicker
    options={field.options}
    value={value}
    onChange={handleChange}
    label={displayLabel}
  />
)}
```

| **Pro**: Complete customization | no dependencies |
| --- | --- |
| **Con**: More code | need to maintain |

---

**Optie D: Platform-specific files** ⭐ **SCALABLE**

Create separate files:
```
FormField.web.tsx    // Uses HTML <select>
FormField.native.tsx // Uses Picker or custom
FormField.tsx        // Shared logic
```

```ts
import { Modal, FlatList, Pressable } from 'react-native';

| const [modalVisible, setModalVisible] = React.useState(false) |  |
| --- | --- |
| const selectedOption = options?.find((opt: any) => opt.value === value) |  |
| onChange(item.value) |  |
| setModalVisible(false) |  |
| ) |  |
| } |  |

// Usage:
{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  <NativePicker
    options={field.options}
    value={value}
    onChange={handleChange}
    label={displayLabel}
  />
)}
```

| **Pro**: Complete customization | no dependencies |
| --- | --- |
| **Con**: More code | need to maintain |

---

**Optie D: Platform-specific files** ⭐ **SCALABLE**

Create separate files:
```
FormField.web.tsx    // Uses HTML <select>

```html
// FormField.web.tsx
export const SelectField = ({ field, value, onChange, error }: any) => (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => onChange(e.target.value)}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
);

// FormField.native.tsx
import { Picker } from '@react-native-picker/picker';

export const SelectField = ({ field, value, onChange, error }: any) => (
  <View style={[styles.input, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <Picker
      selectedValue={value || ''}
      onValueChange={(itemValue) => onChange(itemValue)}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <Picker.Item key={opt.value} label={opt.label} value={opt.value} />
      ))}
    </Picker>
  </View>
);

// FormField.tsx
import { SelectField } from './FormField'; // Auto-resolves .web or .native

export const FormField = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }) => {
  // ...
  {field.type === 'select' && (
    <SelectField field={field} value={value} onChange={handleChange} error={error} />
  )}
}
```

```ts
// FormField.web.tsx
export const SelectField = ({ field, value, onChange, error }: any) => (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => onChange(e.target.value)}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
);

// FormField.native.tsx
import { Picker } from '@react-native-picker/picker';

export const SelectField = ({ field, value, onChange, error }: any) => (
  <View style={[styles.input, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <Picker
      selectedValue={value || ''}
      onValueChange={(itemValue) => onChange(itemValue)}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <Picker.Item key={opt.value} label={opt.label} value={opt.value} />
      ))}
    </Picker>
  </View>
);

// FormField.tsx
import { SelectField } from './FormField'; // Auto-resolves .web or .native

export const FormField = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }) => {
  // ...
  {field.type === 'select' && (
    <SelectField field={field} value={value} onChange={handleChange} error={error} />
  )}
}

```json
{field.type === 'select' && (
  <View style={styles.radioGroup}>
    {field.options?.map(opt => {
      // Skip "Selecteer..." placeholder option
      if (opt.value === '') return null;
      
      const isSelected = value === opt.value;
      
      return (
        <TouchableOpacity
          key={opt.value}
          style={[
            styles.radioButton,
            isSelected && styles.radioButtonSelected,
            error && styles.radioButtonError
          ]}
          onPress={() => handleChange(opt.value)}
          accessibilityRole="radio"
          accessibilityState={{ checked: isSelected }}
          accessibilityLabel={opt.label}
        >
          <View style={[
            styles.radioCircle,
            isSelected && styles.radioCircleSelected
          ]}>
            {isSelected && <View style={styles.radioCircleInner} />}
          </View>
          <Text style={[
            styles.radioLabel,
            isSelected && styles.radioLabelSelected
          ]}>
            {opt.label}
          </Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
      );
    })}
  </View>
)}
```

```ts
{field.type === 'select' && (
  <View style={styles.radioGroup}>
    {field.options?.map(opt => {
      // Skip "Selecteer..." placeholder option
      if (opt.value === '') return null;
      
      const isSelected = value === opt.value;
      
      return (
        <TouchableOpacity
          key={opt.value}
          style={[
            styles.radioButton,
            isSelected && styles.radioButtonSelected,
            error && styles.radioButtonError
          ]}
          onPress={() => handleChange(opt.value)}
          accessibilityRole="radio"
          accessibilityState={{ checked: isSelected }}
          accessibilityLabel={opt.label}
        >
          <View style={[
            styles.radioCircle,
            isSelected && styles.radioCircleSelected
          ]}>
            {isSelected && <View style={styles.radioCircleInner} />}
          </View>
          <Text style={[
            styles.radioLabel,
            isSelected && styles.radioLabelSelected
          ]}>
            {opt.label}
          </Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
      );
    })}
  </View>
)}

```
// Radio button group
radioGroup: {
  gap: 12
},
radioButton: {
  flexDirection: 'row',
  alignItems: 'center',
  backgroundColor: '#FFFFFF',
  borderWidth: 2,
  borderColor: '#D1D1D6',
  borderRadius: 8,
  padding: 16,
  minHeight: 48, // WCAG touch target
},
radioButtonSelected: {
  borderColor: '#007AFF',
  backgroundColor: '#F0F8FF'
},
radioButtonError: {
  borderColor: '#FF3B30'
},
radioCircle: {
  width: 24,
  height: 24,
  borderRadius: 12,
  borderWidth: 2,
  borderColor: '#D1D1D6',
  marginRight: 12,
  justifyContent: 'center',
  alignItems: 'center'
},
radioCircleSelected: {
  borderColor: '#007AFF'
},
radioCircleInner: {
  width: 12,
  height: 12,
  borderRadius: 6,
  backgroundColor: '#007AFF'
},
radioLabel: {
  fontSize: 16,
  color: '#1C1C1E',
  flex: 1
},
radioLabelSelected: {
  fontWeight: '600',
  color: '#007AFF'
},
```

```ts
// Radio button group
radioGroup: {
  gap: 12
},
radioButton: {
  flexDirection: 'row',
  alignItems: 'center',
  backgroundColor: '#FFFFFF',
  borderWidth: 2,
  borderColor: '#D1D1D6',
  borderRadius: 8,
  padding: 16,
  minHeight: 48, // WCAG touch target
},
radioButtonSelected: {
  borderColor: '#007AFF',
  backgroundColor: '#F0F8FF'
},
radioButtonError: {
  borderColor: '#FF3B30'
},
radioCircle: {
  width: 24,
  height: 24,
  borderRadius: 12,
  borderWidth: 2,
  borderColor: '#D1D1D6',
  marginRight: 12,
  justifyContent: 'center',
  alignItems: 'center'
},
radioCircleSelected: {
  borderColor: '#007AFF'
},
radioCircleInner: {
  width: 12,
  height: 12,
  borderRadius: 6,
  backgroundColor: '#007AFF'
},
radioLabel: {
  fontSize: 16,
  color: '#1C1C1E',
  flex: 1
},
radioLabelSelected: {
  fontWeight: '600',
  color: '#007AFF'
},
```

```
// Van:
import { View, Text, TextInput, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, ActivityIndicator, StyleSheet, Platform } from 'react-native';

// Naar:
import { View, Text, TextInput, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, ActivityIndicator, StyleSheet } from 'react-native';
```

## VISUAL PREVIEW

**Voor (Dropdown):**
```
┌─────────────────────────┐
│ Woonsituatie           ▼│
└─────────────────────────┘
```

**Na (Radio Buttons):**
```
Woonsituatie

┌─────────────────────────┐
│ ○  Huurder             │
└─────────────────────────┘
┌─────────────────────────┐
│ ●  Koper               │ ← Selected (blue)
└─────────────────────────┘
┌─────────────────────────┐
│ ○  Inwonend            │
└─────────────────────────┘
┌─────────────────────────┐
│ ○  Anders              │
└─────────────────────────┘
```

```ts
// Van:
import { View, Text, TextInput, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, ActivityIndicator, StyleSheet, Platform } from 'react-native';

// Naar:
import { View, Text, TextInput, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, ActivityIndicator, StyleSheet } from 'react-native';
```

---

## VISUAL PREVIEW

**Voor (Dropdown):**
```
┌─────────────────────────┐
│ Woonsituatie           ▼│
└─────────────────────────┘
```

**Na (Radio Buttons):**
```
Woonsituatie

┌─────────────────────────┐
│ ○  Huurder             │
└─────────────────────────┘
┌─────────────────────────┐
│ ●  Koper               │ ← Selected (blue)
└─────────────────────────┘
┌─────────────────────────┐
│ ○  Inwonend            │
└─────────────────────────┘
┌─────────────────────────┐
│ ○  Anders              │
└─────────────────────────┘
```

```html
<select>
  <option>Huurder</option>
  <option>Koper</option>
</select>
```

```ts
<select>
  <option>Huurder</option>
  <option>Koper</option>
</select>
```

```html
<View style={styles.radioGroup}>
  {field.options?.map(opt => (
    <TouchableOpacity style={styles.radioButton}>
      <View style={styles.radioCircle}>
        {isSelected && <View style={styles.radioCircleInner} />}
      </View>
      <Text style={styles.radioLabel}>{opt.label}</Text>
    </TouchableOpacity>
  ))}
</View>
```

**Features:**
- ✅ Skips "Selecteer..." placeholder automatisch
- ✅ Visual feedback: Selected items krijgen blauwe border + achtergrond
- ✅ Accessibility: `accessibilityRole="radio"` en `accessibilityState`
- ✅ Touch targets: 48dp minimum height (WCAG compliant)
- ✅ Error state: Rode border bij validation errors

### ✅ 4. Verwijderd: Unused native placeholder styles
- `nativePlaceholder`
- `nativePlaceholderText`
- `nativePlaceholderSubtext`

Geen ESLint warnings meer!

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| ### ✅ 5. Toegevoegd | Radio button styles |
| `radioGroup` | Container met gap tussen buttons |
| `radioButton` | Individuele button met white background |
| `radioButtonSelected` | Blue border + light blue background |
| `radioButtonError` | Red border voor validation errors |
| `radioCircle` | Outer circle (24x24) |
| `radioCircleSelected` | Blue border when selected |
| `radioCircleInner` | Inner filled circle (12x12) when selected |
| `radioLabel` | Text label |
| `radioLabelSelected` | Bold + blue text when selected |

```html
{config.conditionals?.map((conditional: any) => (
  <ConditionalField
    key={conditional.id}
    condition={conditional.condition}
    formData={state}
  >
    {/* CHILDREN ONTBREEKT HIER */}
  </ConditionalField>
))}
```

De `ConditionalField` verwacht children (de content die conditioneel getoond wordt), maar krijgt niks.

### Root Cause
De `conditionals` in config zijn **text displays**, geen field wrappers. Ze moeten ZELF de content renderen, niet wachten op children.

---

## **PROBLEEM 3: Invariant Violation blijft bestaan**

### Diagnose
Als de crash NOG STEEDS gebeurt na verwijderen van alle `<select>` en `<option>` tags, dan is er een andere oorzaak:

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| *Mogelijke oorzaken | ** |
| 1. **Cached bundle** | Oude code zit nog in cache |
| 2. **Andere HTML elements** | Misschien nog ergens anders HTML gebruikt? |
| 3. **Development vs Production build** | Metro bundler cache |

### Verificatie nodig
Waar PRECIES crasht het? Welke component? Welk element?

---

## **PROBLEEM 4: Focus op mobiel**

Je hebt helemaal gelijk. Een app voor telefoongebruik moet NATIVE-FIRST zijn, niet web-first.

---

## COMPLETE REFACTOR VOORSTEL

### Nieuwe aanpak: Custom Square Radio Buttons (Native-First)

**Design:**
```
Woonsituatie

┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐
│ Huurder │ │  Koper  │ │Inwonend │ │ Anders  │
└─────────┘ └─────────┘ └─────────┘ └─────────┘
   (blue)     (grey)      (grey)      (grey)
```

```ts
{config.conditionals?.map((conditional: any) => (
  <ConditionalField
    key={conditional.id}
    condition={conditional.condition}
    formData={state}
  >
    {/* CHILDREN ONTBREEKT HIER */}
  </ConditionalField>
))}
```

De `ConditionalField` verwacht children (de content die conditioneel getoond wordt), maar krijgt niks.

### Root Cause
De `conditionals` in config zijn **text displays**, geen field wrappers. Ze moeten ZELF de content renderen, niet wachten op children.

## COMPLETE REFACTOR VOORSTEL

### Nieuwe aanpak: Custom Square Radio Buttons (Native-First)

**Design:**
```
Woonsituatie

┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐
│ Huurder │ │  Koper  │ │Inwonend │ │ Anders  │
└─────────┘ └─────────┘ └─────────┘ └─────────┘
   (blue)     (grey)      (grey)      (grey)
```

```json
{config.conditionals?.map((conditional: any) => (
  <ConditionalField
    key={conditional.id}
    condition={conditional.condition}
    formData={state}
  >
    <View style={styles.conditionalDisplay}>
      <Text style={styles.conditionalText}>
        {conditional.template
          .replace('{aantalKinderen}', state.C1?.aantalKinderen || 0)
          .replace('{plural}', (state.C1?.aantalKinderen || 0) === 1 ? 'kind' : 'kinderen')}
      </Text>
    </View>
  </ConditionalField>
))}
```

```ts
{config.conditionals?.map((conditional: any) => (
  <ConditionalField
    key={conditional.id}
    condition={conditional.condition}
    formData={state}
  >
    <View style={styles.conditionalDisplay}>
      <Text style={styles.conditionalText}>
        {conditional.template
          .replace('{aantalKinderen}', state.C1?.aantalKinderen || 0)
          .replace('{plural}', (state.C1?.aantalKinderen || 0) === 1 ? 'kind' : 'kinderen')}
      </Text>
    </View>
  </ConditionalField>
))}
```

```
radio-chips
```

```json
{field.type === 'radio-chips' && (
  <ScrollView 
    horizontal 
    showsHorizontalScrollIndicator={false}
    style={styles.chipScrollContainer}
    contentContainerStyle={styles.chipContainer}
  >
    {field.options?.map(opt => {
      if (opt.value === '') return null;
      const isSelected = value === opt.value;
      
      return (
        <TouchableOpacity
          key={opt.value}
          style={[
            styles.chip,
            isSelected && styles.chipSelected,
            error && styles.chipError
          ]}
          onPress={() => handleChange(opt.value)}
          accessibilityRole="radio"
          accessibilityState={{ checked: isSelected }}
        >
          <Text style={[
            styles.chipText,
            isSelected && styles.chipTextSelected
          ]}>
            {opt.label}
          </Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
      );
    })}
  </ScrollView>
)}
```

```ts
{field.type === 'radio-chips' && (
  <ScrollView 
    horizontal 
    showsHorizontalScrollIndicator={false}
    style={styles.chipScrollContainer}
    contentContainerStyle={styles.chipContainer}
  >
    {field.options?.map(opt => {
      if (opt.value === '') return null;
      const isSelected = value === opt.value;
      
      return (
        <TouchableOpacity
          key={opt.value}
          style={[
            styles.chip,
            isSelected && styles.chipSelected,
            error && styles.chipError
          ]}
          onPress={() => handleChange(opt.value)}
          accessibilityRole="radio"
          accessibilityState={{ checked: isSelected }}
        >
          <Text style={[
            styles.chipText,
            isSelected && styles.chipTextSelected
          ]}>
            {opt.label}
          </Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
      );
    })}
  </ScrollView>
)}
```

  marginVertical: 8
},
chipContainer: {

},

  borderWidth: 2,
  borderColor: '#D1D1D6',

  paddingHorizontal: 20,
  minHeight: 48,

  alignItems: 'center'
},

  borderColor: '#007AFF'
},

},
chipText: {
  fontSize: 16,

  color: '#1C1C1E'
},
chipTextSelected: {
  color: '#FFFFFF'
}
```

C1: {

      id: 'woonsituatie',
      label: 'Woonsituatie',
      type: 'radio-chips', // ← Changed from 'select'
      required: true,
      options: [
        { label: 'Selecteer...', value: '' }, // Will be skipped
        { label: 'Huurder', value: 'Huurder' },
        { label: 'Koper', value: 'Koper' },
        { label: 'Inwonend', value: 'Inwonend' },

    }

}

        { label: 'Alleenstaand', value: 'Alleenstaand' },
        { label: 'Gehuwd/Samenwonend', value: 'Gehuwd' }
      ]
    }
  ]
}

### ✅ 5. Styles - Complete cleanup
**Verwijderd (unused web/vertical radio):**
- `radioGroup`
- `radioButton`, `radioButtonSelected`, `radioButtonError`
- `radioCircle`, `radioCircleSelected`, `radioCircleInner` ← **Geen ESLint warning meer!**
- `radioLabel`, `radioLabelSelected`
- `selectContainer`, `select` (web-only HTML)

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| *Toegevoegd (mobile | first chips):** |
| `chipScrollContainer` | Horizontal scroll wrapper |
| `chipContainer` | Flex row met gap |
| `chip` | Individual chip button (white, rounded corners) |
| `chipSelected` | Blue background + blue border |
| `chipError` | Red border |
| `chipText` | Default text styling |
| `chipTextSelected` | White text for selected |

---

## Visual Result (Mobile-First Design):

### **C1 - Woonsituatie:**
```
Woonsituatie

← [Huurder] [Koper] [Inwonend] [Anders] →
      ↑
   (selected - blue background)
```

### **C4 - Burgerlijke staat:**
```
Burgerlijke staat

[Alleenstaand] [Gehuwd/Samenwonend]
       ↑
   (selected - blue)
```

---

## Why This Works (Native-First):

### ❌ Old Approach (Web-First):
```
HTML <select> → React Native can't render → Crash
Platform.select → Different code paths → Maintenance nightmare
```

### ✅ New Approach (Native-First):
```
React Native components only:
- ScrollView (native)
- TouchableOpacity (native)
- View (native)
- Text (native)

Works EVERYWHERE:
- iOS ✅
- Android ✅
- Web ✅ (via react-native-web)
```

```ts
<ConditionalField>
  <View style={styles.conditionalDisplay}>
    <Text style={styles.conditionalText}>
      {/* Template met replacements */}
    </Text>
  </View>
</ConditionalField>
```

### ✅ 5. Styles - Complete cleanup
**Verwijderd (unused web/vertical radio):**
- `radioGroup`
- `radioButton`, `radioButtonSelected`, `radioButtonError`
- `radioCircle`, `radioCircleSelected`, `radioCircleInner` ← **Geen ESLint warning meer!**
- `radioLabel`, `radioLabelSelected`
- `selectContainer`, `select` (web-only HTML)

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| *Toegevoegd (mobile | first chips):** |
| `chipScrollContainer` | Horizontal scroll wrapper |
| `chipContainer` | Flex row met gap |
| `chip` | Individual chip button (white, rounded corners) |
| `chipSelected` | Blue background + blue border |
| `chipError` | Red border |
| `chipText` | Default text styling |
| `chipTextSelected` | White text for selected |

---

- Text (native)

Works EVERYWHERE:

const navigateNext = () => {
  if (currentPageIndex < WIZARD_PAGES.length - 1) {
    setCurrentPageIndex(prev => prev + 1);

};

const navigateNext = () => {
  if (currentPageIndex < WIZARD_PAGES.length - 1) {
    setCurrentPageIndex(prev => prev + 1);
  }
};

const isLastPage = currentPageIndex === WIZARD_PAGES.length;
```

```html
/* ================================================================
 Patched Version: v31 (baseline: v31.patched.20251203-0100.txt)
 Datum/Tijd (ISO): 2025-12-06T14:45:00+01:00
 Uitgevoerd door: Claude (Anthropic AI Assistant)
 Patch IDs toegepast:
   - P1-T5A: Fix Wizard → Dashboard navigatie (navigateNext boundary + gating logic verduidelijkt)
   - P1-T5B: Migratie naar react-native-safe-area-context (SafeAreaProvider wrapper toegevoegd)
 Samenvatting:
   - navigateNext: boundary aangepast van (length - 1) naar (length) zodat Dashboard bereikbaar is
   - Gating logic: isLastPage hernoemd naar atDashboard + isLastWizardPage toegevoegd voor duidelijkheid
   - SafeAreaProvider: toegevoegd als root wrapper (boven FormProvider) voor cross-platform safe area support
 Bestanden/Locaties geraakt:
   - AppContent component: navigateNext functie (lijn ~581)
   - AppContent component: gating logic (lijn ~607-610)
   - AppContent component: FormPage props (lijn ~637)
   - App root component: SafeAreaProvider wrapper (lijn ~649-653)
   - Imports: react-native-safe-area-context toegevoegd (lijn 3)
 Randvoorwaarden:
   - Dependency vereist: npx expo install react-native-safe-area-context
   - Geen breaking changes in bestaande functionaliteit
   - Alle eerdere patches (AsyncStorage, radio-chips, etc.) behouden
 DoD:
   - Klik "Bekijk Resultaat" op C10 → Dashboard rendert ✓
   - Safe area context beschikbaar voor alle child components ✓
   - Backward compatibility: Terug/Vorige buttons werken ✓
 Tests:
   - Flow test: C1 → C7 → C10 → (klik "Bekijk Resultaat") → Dashboard
   - Dashboard test: "Terug naar Laatste Pagina" → C10, "Begin Opnieuw" → C1
   - Device test: iPhone met notch + Android met gesture bar → geen content overlap
================================================================ */

| import * as React from 'react' |  |
| --- | --- |
| import { View, Text, TextInput, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, ActivityIndicator, StyleSheet } from 'react-native' |  |
| import { SafeAreaProvider } from 'react-native-safe-area-context' |  |
| import AsyncStorage from '@react-native-async-storage/async-storage' |  |

// ============================================================================
// TYPES
// ============================================================================

type FormAction = { type: string; [key: string]: any };
type FormState = Record<string, any>;
type FormContextValue = { state: FormState; dispatch: React.Dispatch<FormAction> };

type FieldConfig = {
  id: string;
  label: string;
  type: 'text' | 'numeric' | 'radio-chips' | 'toggle';
  required?: boolean;
  defaultValue?: any;
  placeholder?: string;
  labelDynamic?: boolean;
  validation?: { min?: number; max?: number; postcode?: boolean };
  options?: { label: string; value: string }[];
  conditional?: { field: string; operator: '>' | '<' | '>=' | '<=' | '===' | '!=='; value: any };
};

| id: string |  |
| --- | --- |
| title: string |  |
| fields: FieldConfig[] |  |
| } |  |

// ============================================================================
// CONTEXT & STATE MANAGEMENT
// ============================================================================

const FormContext = React.createContext<FormContextValue | undefined>(undefined);

| } |  |
| --- | --- |

| return { ...state, userId: action.userId } |  |
| return { userId: null } |  |

| ) |  |

// ============================================================================
// STORAGE UTILITIES (AsyncStorage for native)

// ============================================================================
// VALIDATION & CONDITIONAL LOGIC
// ============================================================================

const validateField = (field: FieldConfig, value: any): string | null => {
  if (field.required && (value === undefined || value === null || value === '')) {
    return 'Dit veld is verplicht.';
  }

| return `Waarde moet minimaal ${field.validation.min} zijn.` |  |
| --- | --- |
| return `Waarde mag maximaal ${field.validation.max} zijn.` |  |
| return 'Ongeldige postcode (formaat: 1234AB).' |  |

| return null |  |
| --- | --- |
| } |  |

| conditional: FieldConfig['conditional'] |  |
| --- | --- |
| state: FormState |  |

| const [targetPageId, targetFieldId] = conditional.field.split('.') |  |
| --- | --- |
| const targetValue = state[targetPageId]?.[targetFieldId] |  |

  // Coerce conditional value for comparison
  const condValue = conditional.value;

| return (targetValue |  | 0) > condValue; |
| --- | --- | --- |
| return (targetValue |  | 0) < condValue; |
| return (targetValue |  | 0) >= condValue; |
| return (targetValue |  | 0) <= condValue; |

// ============================================================================
// UI COMPONENTS
// ============================================================================

| pageId: string |  |
| --- | --- |
| field: FieldConfig |  |
| value: any |  |

| error: string \| null |  |
| } |  |

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| const FormField | React.FC<FormFieldProps> = ({ pageId, field, value, onChange, error }) => { |

| const validationError = validateField(field | newValue); |

// ============================================================================
// PAGE COMPONENT
// ============================================================================

| page: PageConfig |  |
| --- | --- |

| isLast: boolean |  |

| const { state, dispatch } = useFormContext() |  |

| const [errors, setErrors] = React.useState<Record<string, string \| null>>({}) |  |

| const currentPageState = state |  |

| const handleChange = (fieldId: string | value: any) => { |

| const validationError = validateField(page.fields.find(f => f.id === fieldId)! | value); |

| newErrors[fieldId] = validationError |  |
| --- | --- |
| setErrors(newErrors) |  |

| type: 'SET_PAGE_DATA' |  |
| --- | --- |
| pageId: page.id |  |

| let hasError = false |  |
| --- | --- |

| const value = currentPageData[field.id] |  |
| --- | --- |

    setErrors(newErrors);

| onNext() |  |
| --- | --- |
| } |  |

| ) |  |
| --- | --- |
| } |  |

// ============================================================================
// DASHBOARD & SUMMARY LOGIC
// ============================================================================

| export const calculateFinancialSummary = (c7: any | c10: any) => { |
| --- | --- |
| // Dit is de business logica voor de cashflow berekening | nu geëxtraheerd |
| // C7: Inkomsten | C10: Vaste Lasten |

| const inkomenTotaalMaand = (c7?.nettoMaandsalaris ?? 0) + (c7?.huurtoeslag ?? 0) |  |
| --- | --- |
| const lastenTotaalVast = (c10?.wonen ?? 0) + (c10?.energie ?? 0) + (c10?.verzekeringen ?? 0) + (c10?.abonnementen ?? 0) + (c10?.overig ?? 0) |  |
| const cashflowNetto = inkomenTotaalMaand - lastenTotaalVast |  |

| return { inkomenTotaalMaand, lastenTotaalVast, cashflowNetto } |  |
| --- | --- |
| } |  |

const DashboardScreen: React.FC = () => {
  const { state } = useFormContext();

  const summary = React.useMemo(() => calculateFinancialSummary(state.C7, state.C10), [state.C7, state.C10]);

| return new Intl.NumberFormat('nl-NL', { style: 'currency', currency: 'EUR' }).format(amount) |  |
| --- | --- |
| } |  |

  const isPositive = summary.cashflowNetto >= 0;

| return ( | return ( |
| --- | --- |
| <View style={styles.pageContainer}> | <View style={styles.pageContainer}> |
| <ScrollView contentContainerStyle={styles.scrollContent}> | <ScrollView contentContainerStyle={styles.scrollContent}> |
| <View style={styles.dashboardCard}> | <View style={styles.dashboardCard}> |
| <Text style={styles.dashboardLabel}>Netto Cashflow (Maand)</Text> | <Text style={styles.dashboardLabel}>Netto Cashflow (Maand)</Text> |
| <Text style={[styles.dashboardKPI, { color: isPositive ? '#34C759' : '#FF3B30' }]}> | <Text style={[styles.dashboardKPI, { color: isPositive ? '#34C759' : '#FF3B30' }]}> |
| {formatCurrency(summary.cashflowNetto)} | {formatCurrency(summary.cashflowNetto)} |
| </Text> | </Text> |
| <Text style={styles.dashboardMessage}> | <Text style={styles.dashboardMessage}> |
| {isPositive | {isPositive |
| ? 'Gefeliciteerd! Uw inkomsten dekken momenteel uw vaste lasten.' | ? 'Gefeliciteerd! Uw inkomsten dekken momenteel uw vaste lasten.' |
| : 'Let op: Uw vaste lasten overschrijden momenteel uw berekende maandelijkse inkomsten.'} | : 'Let op: Uw vaste lasten overschrijden momenteel uw berekende maandelijkse inkomsten.'} |
| </Text> | </Text> |
| </View> | </View> |

| <Text style={[styles.summaryValue | { color: '#34C759' }]}> |
| --- | --- |
| <Text style={[styles.summaryValue | { color: '#FF3B30' }]}> |
| <Text style={[styles.summaryValueBold | { color: isPositive ? '#34C759' : '#FF3B30' }]}> |

        <Text style={styles.pageTitle}>Overzicht</Text>
        <Text style={styles.summaryDetail}>Dit overzicht is gebaseerd op de ingevulde velden op de pagina's 'Inkomsten' (C7) en 'Vaste Lasten' (C10).</Text>

| ) |  |
| --- | --- |
| } |  |

// ============================================================================
// WIZARD CONFIGURATION (PAGES)
// ============================================================================

const WIZARD_PAGES: PageConfig[] = [
  {
    id: 'C1',
    title: 'Wonen & Gezinssituatie',
    fields: [
      {
        id: 'woonsituatie',
        label: 'Wat is uw woonsituatie?',
        type: 'radio-chips',
        required: true,
        options: [
          { label: 'Huurhuis', value: 'huur' },
          { label: 'Koophuis', value: 'koop' },
          { label: 'Inwonend', value: 'inwonend' },
        ],
      },
      {
        id: 'burgerlijkeStaat',
        label: 'Burgerlijke staat',
        type: 'radio-chips',
        required: true,
        options: [
          { label: 'Alleenstaand', value: 'alleenstaand' },
          { label: 'Gehuwd/Samenwonend', value: 'gehuwd' },
        ],
      },
      {
        id: 'aantalVolwassenen',
        label: 'Aantal volwassenen (18+)',
        type: 'numeric',
        required: true,
        defaultValue: 1,
        validation: { min: 1, max: 2 },
      },
      {
        id: 'aantalKinderen',
        label: 'Aantal thuiswonende kinderen',
        type: 'numeric',
        required: true,
        defaultValue: 0,
        validation: { min: 0 },
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 'C7',
    title: 'Inkomsten',
    fields: [
      {
        id: 'nettoMaandsalaris',
        label: 'Netto maandsalaris (incl. vakantiegeld)',
        type: 'numeric',
        required: true,
        defaultValue: 0,
      },
      {
        id: 'huurtoeslag',
        label: 'Huurtoeslag (per maand)',
        type: 'numeric',
        required: false,
        defaultValue: 0,
        conditional: { field: 'C1.woonsituatie', operator: '===', value: 'huur' },
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 'C10',
    title: 'Vaste Lasten',
    fields: [
      {
        id: 'wonen',
        label: 'Huur of Hypotheek',
        type: 'numeric',
        required: true,
        defaultValue: 0,
      },
      {
        id: 'energie',
        label: 'Energie (Gas/Elektra)',
        type: 'numeric',
        required: true,
        defaultValue: 0,
      },
      {
        id: 'verzekeringen',
        label: 'Verzekeringen (Totaal)',
        type: 'numeric',
        required: true,
        defaultValue: 0,
      },
      {
        id: 'abonnementen',
        label: 'Abonnementen (Totaal)',
        type: 'numeric',
        required: true,
        defaultValue: 0,
      },
      {
        id: 'overig',
        label: 'Overige Vaste Lasten',
        type: 'numeric',
        required: true,
        defaultValue: 0,
      },
    ],
  },
];

// ============================================================================
// MAIN APP COMPONENT
// ============================================================================

| const { state | dispatch } = useFormContext(); |
| --- | --- |
| const [currentPageIndex | setCurrentPageIndex] = React.useState(0); |
| const [isLoading | setIsLoading] = React.useState(true); |

| const savedState = await Storage.loadState() |  |
| --- | --- |
| dispatch({ type: 'LOAD_SAVED_STATE', data: savedState }) |  |

| type: 'SET_PAGE_DATA' |  |
| --- | --- |
| pageId: page.id |  |
| data: { [field.id]: field.defaultValue } |  |

| setIsLoading(false) |  |
| --- | --- |
| } |  |

| loadAndInit() |  |
| --- | --- |
| }, [dispatch]) |  |

| Storage.saveState(state) |  |
| --- | --- |
| }, [state, isLoading]) |  |

| setCurrentPageIndex(prev => prev + 1) |  |

/* ================================================================
 Patched Version: v31 (baseline: v31.patched.20251203-0100.txt)
 Datum/Tijd (ISO): 2025-12-06T14:45:00+01:00
 Uitgevoerd door: Claude (Anthropic AI Assistant)
 Patch IDs toegepast:
   - P1-T5A: Fix Wizard → Dashboard navigatie (navigateNext boundary + gating logic verduidelijkt)
   - P1-T5B: Migratie naar react-native-safe-area-context (SafeAreaProvider wrapper toegevoegd)
 Samenvatting:
   - navigateNext: boundary aangepast van (length - 1) naar (length) zodat Dashboard bereikbaar is
   - Gating logic: isLastPage hernoemd naar atDashboard + isLastWizardPage toegevoegd voor duidelijkheid
   - SafeAreaProvider: toegevoegd als root wrapper (boven FormProvider) voor cross-platform safe area support
 Bestanden/Locaties geraakt:
   - AppContent component: navigateNext functie (lijn ~581)
   - AppContent component: gating logic (lijn ~607-610)
   - AppContent component: FormPage props (lijn ~637)
   - App root component: SafeAreaProvider wrapper (lijn ~649-653)
   - Imports: react-native-safe-area-context toegevoegd (lijn 3)
 Randvoorwaarden:
   - Dependency vereist: npx expo install react-native-safe-area-context
   - Geen breaking changes in bestaande functionaliteit
   - Alle eerdere patches (AsyncStorage, radio-chips, etc.) behouden
 DoD:
   - Klik "Bekijk Resultaat" op C10 → Dashboard rendert ✓
   - Safe area context beschikbaar voor alle child components ✓
   - Backward compatibility: Terug/Vorige buttons werken ✓
 Tests:
   - Flow test: C1 → C7 → C10 → (klik "Bekijk Resultaat") → Dashboard
   - Dashboard test: "Terug naar Laatste Pagina" → C10, "Begin Opnieuw" → C1
   - Device test: iPhone met notch + Android met gesture bar → geen content overlap
================================================================ */

};

const validateField = (field: FieldConfig, value: any): string | null => {

    return 'Dit veld is verplicht.';
  }

| return (targetValue |  | 0) > condValue; |

| export const calculateFinancialSummary = (c7: any | c10: any) => { |
| --- | --- |
| // Dit is de business logica voor de cashflow berekening | nu geëxtraheerd |
| // C7: Inkomsten | C10: Vaste Lasten |

| const inkomenTotaalMaand = (c7?.nettoMaandsalaris ?? 0) + (c7?.huurtoeslag ?? 0) |  |
| --- | --- |
| const lastenTotaalVast = (c10?.wonen ?? 0) + (c10?.energie ?? 0) + (c10?.verzekeringen ?? 0) + (c10?.abonnementen ?? 0) + (c10?.overig ?? 0) |  |
| const cashflowNetto = inkomenTotaalMaand - lastenTotaalVast |  |

| return { inkomenTotaalMaand, lastenTotaalVast, cashflowNetto } |  |
| --- | --- |
| } |  |

];

---

## PATCH SAMENVATTING

### **P1-T5A: Wizard → Dashboard Navigation Fix**

**Doel:** Fix navigatie boundary zodat Dashboard bereikbaar wordt vanaf laatste wizardpagina

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| *Locatie | ** |
| AppContent component (lijn ~581, ~607 | 610, ~637) |

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| *Acties uitgevoerd | ** |
| 1. ✅ `navigateNext` boundary aangepast | `< WIZARD_PAGES.length - 1` → `< WIZARD_PAGES.length` |
| 2. ✅ Variable naming verduidelijkt | `isLastPage` → `atDashboard` + `isLastWizardPage` toegevoegd |
| 3. ✅ FormPage prop updated | gebruikt `isLastWizardPage` variable |

**DoD:**
- ✅ Syntaxis correct (TypeScript compiles)
- ✅ Logic flow correct: C1 (0) → C7 (1) → C10 (2) → Dashboard (3)
- ✅ Geen breaking changes in bestaande functionaliteit

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| *Tests | ** |
| **Flow test | ** Start app → C1 → vul in → "Volgende" → C7 → vul in → "Volgende" → C10 → vul in → "Bekijk Resultaat" → Dashboard toont ✓ |
| **Dashboard buttons | ** "Terug naar Laatste Pagina" → C10 ✓, "Begin Opnieuw" → C1 ✓ |
| **Backward navigation | ** Dashboard → C10 → "Vorige" → C7 → "Vorige" → C1 ✓ |

---

### **P1-T5B: Safe Area Context Migratie**

**Doel:** Voeg SafeAreaProvider toe voor cross-platform safe area support

**Locatie:**
- Imports (lijn 3)
- App root component (lijn ~649-653)

**Acties uitgevoerd:**

MOCK AUTH LAYER (geen echte auth, maar UX simulation):

```

│   └── IF NO userId → Show "Sign up" button → Wizard
