| # | Verbetering | Mijn Oordeel | Prioriteit |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Star import React | ✅ Volledig eens | HIGH |
| 2 | Context typed | ✅ Volledig eens | HIGH |
| 3a | WizardPage deps | ✅ Eens | HIGH |
| 3b | LandingScreen deps | ✅ Eens | HIGH |
| 3c | DashboardScreen deps | ❌ Niet eens (infinite loop risk) | HIGH |
| 4 | Index signatures local state | ✅ Volledig eens | HIGH |
| 5 | Storage type fixes | ✅ Volledig eens | HIGH |
| 6 | loadAllFormData typing | ✅ Volledig eens | MEDIUM |
| 7 | Conditional safe indexing | ✅ Volledig eens | MEDIUM |
| 8 | Validation typed | ✅ Volledig eens | HIGH |
| 9 | Effect dependencies | Zie 3a/3b/3c | HIGH |
| 10 | Reducer merge note | ℹ️ Akkoord, document | LOW |
| 11 | Native select (NOT applied) | ✅ Correct besluit | FUTURE |
| 12 | Housekeeping | ✅ Eens | LOW |

```js
// MIJN CODE:
const FormContext = createContext();
const useFormContext = () => {
  const context = useContext(FormContext);
  if (!context) throw new Error('...');
  return context;
};

// VERBETERDE CODE:
type FormAction = { type: string; [key: string]: any };
type FormState = Record<string, any>;
type FormContextValue = { 
  state: FormState; 
  dispatch: React.Dispatch<FormAction> 
};

const FormContext = React.createContext<FormContextValue | undefined>(undefined);
function useFormContext(): FormContextValue {
  const ctx = React.useContext(FormContext);
  if (!ctx) throw new Error('...');
  return ctx;
}
```

```js
// MIJN CODE:
const FormContext = createContext();
const useFormContext = () => {
  const context = useContext(FormContext);
  if (!context) throw new Error('...');
  return context;
};

// VERBETERDE CODE:
type FormAction = { type: string; [key: string]: any };
type FormState = Record<string, any>;
type FormContextValue = { 
  state: FormState; 
  dispatch: React.Dispatch<FormAction> 
};

const FormContext = React.createContext<FormContextValue | undefined>(undefined);
function useFormContext(): FormContextValue {
  const ctx = React.useContext(FormContext);
  if (!ctx) throw new Error('...');
  return ctx;
}
```

```js
  loadData();
}, [pageId, config, dispatch]); // Complete dependencies
```

```js
// Optie 1: Lege dependencies (mount-only)
useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  loadSummary();
}, []); // Runs only on mount

// Optie 2: Specifieke dependencies
useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  loadSummary();
}, [state.C7, state.C10]); // Only re-run if financial data changes
```

```html
// MIJN CODE:
const loadAllFormData = async () => {
  const pages = ['C1', 'C4', 'C7', 'C10'];
  const allData = {};

  }

};

// VERBETERDE CODE:
const loadAllFormData = async (): Promise<Record<string, any> & { userId?: string }> => {
  const pages: Array<'C1'|'C4'|'C7'|'C10'> = ['C1','C4','C7','C10'];
  const allData: Record<string, any> = {};
  for (const pageId of pages) {
    const data: any | null = await loadPageData(pageId);
    if (data) allData[pageId] = data;
  }
  const userId: string | null = await getUserId();
  if (userId) allData.userId = userId;
  return allData;
};
```

```js
// MIJN CODE:
const loadAllFormData = async () => {
  const pages = ['C1', 'C4', 'C7', 'C10'];
  const allData = {};
  for (const pageId of pages) {
    const data = await loadPageData(pageId);
    if (data) allData[pageId] = data; // TS7053 error
  }
  return allData;
};

// VERBETERDE CODE:
const loadAllFormData = async (): Promise<Record<string, any> & { userId?: string }> => {
  const pages: Array<'C1'|'C4'|'C7'|'C10'> = ['C1','C4','C7','C10'];
  const allData: Record<string, any> = {};
  for (const pageId of pages) {
    const data: any | null = await loadPageData(pageId);
    if (data) allData[pageId] = data;
  }
  const userId: string | null = await getUserId();
  if (userId) allData.userId = userId;
  return allData;
};
```

```html
// MIJN CODE:
const evaluateCondition = () => {
  const fieldPath = condition.field.split('.');
  let value = formData;
  for (const key of fieldPath) {
    value = value?.[key]; // Implicitly any
    if (value === undefined) return false;
  }
};

// VERBETERDE CODE:
const evaluateCondition = () => {
  const fieldPath: string[] = condition.field.split('.');
  let value: any = formData;
  for (const key of fieldPath) {
    value = (value as Record<string, any>)?.[key]; // Safe cast
    if (value === undefined) return false;
  }
};
```

```js
// MIJN CODE:

  const fieldPath = condition.field.split('.');
  let value = formData;
  for (const key of fieldPath) {
    value = value?.[key]; // Implicitly any
    if (value === undefined) return false;
  }
};

// VERBETERDE CODE:
const evaluateCondition = () => {
  const fieldPath: string[] = condition.field.split('.');
  let value: any = formData;
  for (const key of fieldPath) {
    value = (value as Record<string, any>)?.[key]; // Safe cast
    if (value === undefined) return false;
  }
```
```js
};
```

```
// Current behavior:
case 'SET_PAGE_DATA':
  return {
    ...state,
    [action.pageId]: { ...state[action.pageId], ...action.data }
  };
```

```js
// Current behavior:
case 'SET_PAGE_DATA':
  return {
    ...state,
    [action.pageId]: { ...state[action.pageId], ...action.data }
  };
```

```yaml
fieldId: undefined
```

```sql
case 'SET_PAGE_DATA':
  // Option 1: Replace entire page (stricter)
  return {
    ...state,
    [action.pageId]: action.data // Full replacement
  };

// Option 2: Explicit clear support
case 'CLEAR_PAGE_FIELDS':
  const newPageData = { ...state[action.pageId] };
  action.fieldIds.forEach(id => delete newPageData[id]);
  return { ...state, [action.pageId]: newPageData };
```

```js
case 'SET_PAGE_DATA':
  // Option 1: Replace entire page (stricter)
  return {
    ...state,
    [action.pageId]: action.data // Full replacement
  };

// Option 2: Explicit clear support
case 'CLEAR_PAGE_FIELDS':
  const newPageData = { ...state[action.pageId] };
  action.fieldIds.forEach(id => delete newPageData[id]);
  return { ...state, [action.pageId]: newPageData };
```

```js
// Current code (web-only):
<select style={styles.select} value={value} onChange={...}>
  {field.options.map(opt => <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>)}
</select>

// Native alternative (future):
import { Picker } from '@react-native-picker/picker';
<Picker selectedValue={value} onValueChange={...}>
  {field.options.map(opt => <Picker.Item label={opt.label} value={opt.value} />)}
</Picker>
```

```
// IN PLAATS VAN DE PATCH:
useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state); // ❌ state dependency
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  loadSummary();
}, [state]); // ❌ Re-runs te vaak

// GEBRUIK DIT:
useEffect(() => {
  const summaryData = {
    C7: state.C7,
    C10: state.C10,
    userId: state.userId
  };
  
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  
  loadSummary();
}, []); // ✅ Mount-only, of [state.C7, state.C10] voor re-calc on data change
```

```js
// IN PLAATS VAN DE PATCH:
useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state); // ❌ state dependency
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  loadSummary();
}, [state]); // ❌ Re-runs te vaak

// GEBRUIK DIT:
useEffect(() => {
  const summaryData = {
    C7: state.C7,
    C10: state.C10,
    userId: state.userId
  };
  
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  
  loadSummary();
}, []); // ✅ Mount-only, of [state.C7, state.C10] voor re-calc on data change
```

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Consistentie | Alle React API's via één namespace |
| TypeScript compatibility | Star imports werken betrouwbaarder met TypeScript |
| Tree | shaking: Module bundlers kunnen beter optimaliseren |
| Toekomstbestendig | Voorkomt naming conflicts bij updates |

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Type safety | TypeScript kan nu fouten vangen tijdens development |
| IntelliSense | IDE autocomplete werkt beter |
| Documentatie | Types documenteren de API |
| Refactoring | Wijzigingen in state structure worden automatisch gedetecteerd |

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Correctheid | Effect re-runs wanneer dependencies echt veranderen |
| Bugs voorkomen | Voorkomt stale closures |
| ESLint compliance | Geen warnings meer |

- Dashboard mount → Effect runs → Calls P6 → Returns data → Updates summary state
- Summary update triggers parent re-render → Dashboard re-mounts → Effect runs AGAIN
- Infinite loop risk als state object reference wijzigt
- P6 moet eenmalig bij mount draaien, niet bij elke state change

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| TS7053 opgelost | TypeScript weet dat string indexing toegestaan is |
| Type documentatie | Duidelijk wat elk object bevat |
| Betere error messages | TypeScript kan specifiekere fouten geven |

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Parameter types | TypeScript forceert correcte usage |
| Return types | Caller weet wat te verwachten |
| Index signature | store[key] is nu legaal |

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Type safety | pages array is nu type-checked |
| Index signature | is nu legaal |
| Return type | Caller weet structuur van resultaat |
| Union type voor userId | Optionele property gedocumenteerd |

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Type assertion | TypeScript weet dat indexing veilig is |
| Expliciete types | Geen implicit any |
| Runtime safety | Optional chaining blijft bestaan |

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| FieldConfig type | Documenteert field structure |
| Parameter types | Voorkomt verkeerde argumenten |
| Return types | Consistent validation result format |
| Type casting | voor min/max is expliciet |

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| ✅ Eens met risk assessment | Dit is inderdaad een potentieel probleem |
| ✅ Eens met beslissing | Contract expectation is redelijk voor Phase 1 |
| ⚠️ Phase 2 overweging | Bij dynamic sections moet dit mogelijk herzien worden |

- ✅ Eens dat dit een probleem is voor iOS/Android
- ✅ Eens dat NOT APPLIED correct is voor Phase 1 (web-based POC)
- ✅ Documentatie in FUTURE_ENHANCEMENTS.md dekt dit al af

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| ✅ #1, #2, #3a, #3b, #4, #5, #8 | Alle TypeScript type fixes |
| ⚠️ #3c | FIX DIFFERENTLY - Dashboard effect moet [] blijven of snapshot state |

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| #6, #7 | Type safety improvements |
| #11 | Native Picker component |

- #10: Known limitation van reducer merge semantics in FUTURE_ENHANCEMENTS.md

## Analyse van Voorgestelde Verbeteringen

### 1) Imports & React usage (A) ✅ EENS

### 2) Context + Reducer typed (A) ✅ EENS

### 3) ESLint react-hooks/exhaustive-deps fixes (B) ⚠️ GEDEELTELIJK EENS

### 4) Index signatures for component-local state (C) ✅ EENS

### 5) Storage utilities - type fixes (TS7006) ✅ EENS

### 6) loadAllFormData - index signature + PageId typing (TS7053) ✅ EENS

### 7) Conditional evaluation - string path & safe indexing ✅ EENS

### 8) Validation engine - explicit types (TS7006) ✅ EENS

### 9) Dashboard & Landing effects - dependencies corrected

### 10) Notes on reducer merge semantics ℹ️ INFO - AKKOORD

### 11) Future fix - React Native vs Web select element (D) ✅ EENS - NOT APPLIED IS CORRECT

### 12) Housekeeping ✅ EENS

## SAMENVATTING

## AANBEVELINGEN

### Documenteer:

### Kritiek punt - DashboardScreen effect fix:

Ik ga de patch notes analyseren en per verbetering aangeven of ik het ermee eens ben en wat het verschil betekent.

Verschil:
javascript
Waarom dit beter is:

Mijn oordeel: ✅ Volledig eens. Dit is een best practice in moderne React/TypeScript projecten.

Verschil:
javascript
Waarom dit beter is:

Mijn oordeel: ✅ Volledig eens. Dit lost het "implicit any" probleem op en maakt de code veel robuuster.

Verschil:
javascript
Waarom dit beter is:

MAAR - Kritische nuance:
WizardPage: ✅ Eens - dispatch en config toevoegen is correct
LandingScreen: ✅ Eens - dispatch en onStart toevoegen is correct
DashboardScreen: ❌ NIET EENS - [state] als dependency is PROBLEMATISCH
Probleem met DashboardScreen [state] dependency:
javascript
Waarom dit fout is:

Betere oplossing:
javascript
Mijn oordeel voor #3: ✅ Eens met WizardPage en LandingScreen, ❌ Niet eens met DashboardScreen (risico op infinite loop)

Verschil:
javascript
Waarom dit beter is:

Mijn oordeel: ✅ Volledig eens. Dit lost de  indexing errors op.

Verschil:
javascript
Waarom dit beter is:

Mijn oordeel: ✅ Volledig eens. Essentieel voor TypeScript compatibility.

Verschil:
javascript
Waarom dit beter is:

Mijn oordeel: ✅ Volledig eens. Lost TS7053 errors op en verbetert type safety.

Verschil:
javascript
Waarom dit beter is:

Mijn oordeel: ✅ Volledig eens. Behoud runtime safety met TypeScript compliance.

Verschil:
javascript
Waarom dit beter is:

Mijn oordeel: ✅ Volledig eens. Maakt validation engine type-safe en zelf-documenterend.

Zie #3 hierboven - Gedeeltelijk eens (LandingScreen ✅, DashboardScreen ❌)

Opmerking in patch:
javascript
Risico: Als UI een field verwijdert maar niet  stuurt, blijft oude waarde in state.
Mijn standpunt:

Betere oplossing voor Phase 2:
javascript
Mijn oordeel: ℹ️ Akkoord met huidige implementatie, maar documenteer dit als known limitation.

Opmerking:
javascript
Mijn standpunt:

Phase 2 implementatie strategie:
javascript
Mijn oordeel: ✅ Volledig eens - Correct om dit uit te stellen tot native testing begint.

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |

```
useEffect(...)

React.useEffect(...)
```

**Claude:**

```js
// MIJN CODE:
const FormContext = createContext();
const useFormContext = () => {
  const context = useContext(FormContext);
  if (!context) throw new Error('...');
  return context;
};

// VERBETERDE CODE:
type FormAction = { type: string; [key: string]: any };
type FormState = Record<string, any>;
type FormContextValue = { 
  state: FormState; 
  dispatch: React.Dispatch<FormAction> 
};

const FormContext = React.createContext<FormContextValue | undefined>(undefined);
function useFormContext(): FormContextValue {
  const ctx = React.useContext(FormContext);
  if (!ctx) throw new Error('...');
  return ctx;
}
```

```js
// MIJN CODE:
const FormContext = createContext();
const useFormContext = () => {

  if (!context) throw new Error('...');
  return context;
};

// VERBETERDE CODE:

type FormState = Record<string, any>;
type FormContextValue = { 
  state: FormState; 
  dispatch: React.Dispatch<FormAction> 
};

const FormContext = React.createContext<FormContextValue | undefined>(undefined);
function useFormContext(): FormContextValue {
  const ctx = React.useContext(FormContext);
  if (!ctx) throw new Error('...');
  return ctx;
}
```

```js
  state: FormState;

};
```

```js
// MIJN CODE:
const FormContext = createContext();
const useFormContext = () => {
  const context = useContext(FormContext);
  if (!context) throw new Error('...');
  return context;
};

// VERBETERDE CODE:
type FormAction = { type: string; [key: string]: any };

  state: FormState; 
  dispatch: React.Dispatch<FormAction>

  const ctx = React.useContext(FormContext);
  if (!ctx) throw new Error('...');
  return ctx;
}
```

**Claude:**

```
// MIJN CODE (WizardPage):
useEffect(() => {
  const loadData = async () => { ... };
  loadData();
}, [pageId]); // Mist config, dispatch

// VERBETERDE CODE:
const config = React.useMemo(() => formConfig[pageId], [pageId]);
useEffect(() => {
  const loadData = async () => { ... };
  loadData();
}, [pageId, config, dispatch]); // Complete dependencies
```

```js
// MIJN CODE (WizardPage):
useEffect(() => {
  const loadData = async () => { ... };
  loadData();
}, [pageId]); // Mist config, dispatch

// VERBETERDE CODE:
const config = React.useMemo(() => formConfig[pageId], [pageId]);
useEffect(() => {
  const loadData = async () => { ... };
  loadData();
}, [pageId, config, dispatch]); // Complete dependencies
```

**Claude:**

```
// Optie 1: Lege dependencies (mount-only)
useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  loadSummary();
}, []); // Runs only on mount

// Optie 2: Specifieke dependencies
useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  loadSummary();
}, [state.C7, state.C10]); // Only re-run if financial data changes
```

```js
// Optie 1: Lege dependencies (mount-only)
useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  loadSummary();
}, []); // Runs only on mount

// Optie 2: Specifieke dependencies
useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  loadSummary();
}, [state.C7, state.C10]); // Only re-run if financial data changes
```

```html
const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});

// VERBETERDE CODE:

const [errors, setErrors] = React.useState<Record<string, string | null>>({});
const [touched, setTouched] = React.useState<Record<string, boolean>>({});
```

**Claude:**

```html
// MIJN CODE:
```
```html
const Storage = {
  store: {},
  async getItem(key) { return this.store[key] || null; }
}

// VERBETERDE CODE:
const Storage = {
  store: {} as Record<string, any>,
  async getItem(key: string): Promise<any | null> { 
    return this.store[key] || null; 
  }
}
```

```js
// MIJN CODE:

  store: {},
  async getItem(key) { return this.store[key] || null; }
}

  store: {} as Record<string, any>,
  async getItem(key: string): Promise<any | null> { 
    return this.store[key] || null; 
  }
}
```

**Claude:**

```html
// MIJN CODE:
const loadAllFormData = async () => {
  const pages = ['C1', 'C4', 'C7', 'C10'];
  const allData = {};
  for (const pageId of pages) {
    const data = await loadPageData(pageId);
    if (data) allData[pageId] = data; // TS7053 error
  }
  return allData;
};

// VERBETERDE CODE:
const loadAllFormData = async (): Promise<Record<string, any> & { userId?: string }> => {
  const pages: Array<'C1'|'C4'|'C7'|'C10'> = ['C1','C4','C7','C10'];
  const allData: Record<string, any> = {};
  for (const pageId of pages) {
    const data: any | null = await loadPageData(pageId);
    if (data) allData[pageId] = data;
  }
  const userId: string | null = await getUserId();
  if (userId) allData.userId = userId;
  return allData;
};
```

```js
};

  if (userId) allData.userId = userId;
  return allData;
};
```

```html
const loadAllFormData = async (): Promise<Record<string, any> & { userId?: string }> => {
  const pages: Array<'C1'|'C4'|'C7'|'C10'> = ['C1','C4','C7','C10'];
  const allData: Record<string, any> = {};
  for (const pageId of pages) {
    const data: any | null = await loadPageData(pageId);
```

```js
// MIJN CODE:
const loadAllFormData = async () => {
  const pages = ['C1', 'C4', 'C7', 'C10'];
  const allData = {};
  for (const pageId of pages) {
    const data = await loadPageData(pageId);
    if (data) allData[pageId] = data; // TS7053 error
  }
  return allData;
};

// VERBETERDE CODE:
const loadAllFormData = async (): Promise<Record<string, any> & { userId?: string }> => {
  const pages: Array<'C1'|'C4'|'C7'|'C10'> = ['C1','C4','C7','C10'];
  const allData: Record<string, any> = {};
  for (const pageId of pages) {
    const data: any | null = await loadPageData(pageId);
    if (data) allData[pageId] = data;
  }
  const userId: string | null = await getUserId();
  if (userId) allData.userId = userId;
  return allData;
};
```

**Claude:**

```html
// MIJN CODE:
const evaluateCondition = () => {
  const fieldPath = condition.field.split('.');
  let value = formData;
  for (const key of fieldPath) {
    value = value?.[key]; // Implicitly any
    if (value === undefined) return false;
  }
};

// VERBETERDE CODE:
const evaluateCondition = () => {
  const fieldPath: string[] = condition.field.split('.');
  let value: any = formData;
  for (const key of fieldPath) {
    value = (value as Record<string, any>)?.[key]; // Safe cast
    if (value === undefined) return false;
  }
};
```

```js

  const fieldPath = condition.field.split('.');
  let value = formData;

    if (value === undefined) return false;
  }
};

  const fieldPath: string[] = condition.field.split('.');
  let value: any = formData;
  for (const key of fieldPath) {
    value = (value as Record<string, any>)?.[key]; // Safe cast
    if (value === undefined) return false;
  }
};
```

```sql
// MIJN CODE:
const validation = {
  required: (value, fieldLabel) => { ... },
  min: (value, min, fieldLabel) => { ... }
};

const validateField = (field, value) => { ... };

// VERBETERDE CODE:
type FieldConfig = {
  id: string;
  label: string;
  type: 'text'|'numeric'|'select'|'toggle';
  required?: boolean;
  validation?: { min?: number; max?: number; postcode?: boolean };
  // ... etc
};

| required: (value: any, fieldLabel: string): { valid: boolean; error: string | null } => { ... }, |
| --- | --- |
| min: (value: number, min: number, fieldLabel: string): { valid: boolean; error: string | null } => { ... } |

const validateField = (field: FieldConfig, value: any): { valid: boolean; error: string | null } => { ... };
```

```
  return {
    ...state,
    [action.pageId]: { ...state[action.pageId], ...action.data }
  };
```

---

**Claude:**

```sql
case 'SET_PAGE_DATA':
  // Option 1: Replace entire page (stricter)
  return {
    ...state,
    [action.pageId]: action.data // Full replacement
  };

// Option 2: Explicit clear support
case 'CLEAR_PAGE_FIELDS':
  const newPageData = { ...state[action.pageId] };
  action.fieldIds.forEach(id => delete newPageData[id]);
  return { ...state, [action.pageId]: newPageData };
```


**Claude:**

| # | Verbetering | Mijn Oordeel | Prioriteit |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Star import React | ✅ Volledig eens | HIGH |
| 2 | Context typed | ✅ Volledig eens | HIGH |
| 3a | WizardPage deps | ✅ Eens | HIGH |
| 3b | LandingScreen deps | ✅ Eens | HIGH |
| 3c | DashboardScreen deps | ❌ Niet eens (infinite loop risk) | HIGH |
| 4 | Index signatures local state | ✅ Volledig eens | HIGH |
| 5 | Storage type fixes | ✅ Volledig eens | HIGH |
| 6 | loadAllFormData typing | ✅ Volledig eens | MEDIUM |
| 7 | Conditional safe indexing | ✅ Volledig eens | MEDIUM |
| 8 | Validation typed | ✅ Volledig eens | HIGH |
| 9 | Effect dependencies | Zie 3a/3b/3c | HIGH |
| 10 | Reducer merge note | ℹ️ Akkoord, document | LOW |
| 11 | Native select (NOT applied) | ✅ Correct besluit | FUTURE |
| 12 | Housekeeping | ✅ Eens | LOW |

```
// IN PLAATS VAN DE PATCH:
useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state); // ❌ state dependency
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  loadSummary();
}, [state]); // ❌ Re-runs te vaak

// GEBRUIK DIT:
useEffect(() => {
  const summaryData = {
    C7: state.C7,
    C10: state.C10,
    userId: state.userId
  };
  
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  
  loadSummary();
}, []); // ✅ Mount-only, of [state.C7, state.C10] voor re-calc on data change
```

### ✅ #7 - Conditional evaluation safe indexing

### ✅ #8 - Validation engine typed

### ⏭️ #11 - Native select (OVERGESLAGEN zoals gevraagd)

**Claude:**

| Fout | Lijn | Oorzaak | Aanbevolen Fix | Prioriteit |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | 525-538 | Web HTML in React Native context | Custom JSX namespace declaration | HIGH |
| 2 | 617, 770, 787, 800, 817 | key prop niet in interface | Use React.FC<Props> | MEDIUM |
| 3 | 933 | Missing state dependency | Use useMemo for sync calculation | HIGH |
| 4 | 1403 | Missing children (structure error) | Verify <App /> inside <FormProvider> | CRITICAL |

```
JSX element implicitly has type 'any' because no interface 'JSX.IntrinsicElements' exists.(7026)
```

```
JSX element implicitly has type 'any' because no interface 'JSX.IntrinsicElements' exists.(7026)
```

```
react-native-web
```

```html
// Forceer TypeScript om HTML elements te accepteren
{field.type === 'select' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    {/* @ts-ignore - HTML select only works on web via react-native-web */}
    <select
      style={styles.select as any}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}
```

```ts
// Forceer TypeScript om HTML elements te accepteren
{field.type === 'select' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    {/* @ts-ignore - HTML select only works on web via react-native-web */}
    <select
      style={styles.select as any}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}
```

```
npm install --save-dev @types/react-native-web
```

```bash
npm install --save-dev @types/react-native-web
```

```
tsconfig.json
```

```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "types": ["react-native-web"]
  }
}
```

```js
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "types": ["react-native-web"]
  }
}
```

```html
// Voeg toe boven in bestand:
declare global {
  namespace JSX {
    interface IntrinsicElements {
      select: React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.SelectHTMLAttributes<HTMLSelectElement>, HTMLSelectElement>;
      option: React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.OptionHTMLAttributes<HTMLOptionElement>, HTMLOptionElement>;
    }
  }
}
```

```ts
// Voeg toe boven in bestand:
declare global {
  namespace JSX {
    interface IntrinsicElements {
      select: React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.SelectHTMLAttributes<HTMLSelectElement>, HTMLSelectElement>;
      option: React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.OptionHTMLAttributes<HTMLOptionElement>, HTMLOptionElement>;
    }
  }
}
```

```html
import { Platform } from 'react-native';

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS === 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select as any}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  // Use @react-native-picker/picker for native
  <Text>Native picker not implemented yet</Text>
)}
```

**AANBEVOLEN FIX: Optie C** (Custom types declaration)
- Minimalistische oplossing
- Documenteert web-only dependency
- Geen extra packages nodig

### **FOUT 2: Property 'key' does not exist (Lines 617, 770, 787, 800, 817)**

**Foutmelding:**
```
Type '{ key: string; field: FieldConfig; ... }' is not assignable to type '{ field: FieldConfig; ... }'.
Property 'key' does not exist on type '{ field: FieldConfig; ... }'.(2322)
```

```ts
import { Platform } from 'react-native';

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS === 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select as any}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  // Use @react-native-picker/picker for native
  <Text>Native picker not implemented yet</Text>
)}
```

**AANBEVOLEN FIX: Optie C** (Custom types declaration)
- Minimalistische oplossing
- Documenteert web-only dependency
- Geen extra packages nodig

```
}
```

```ts
const FormField = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }: FormFieldProps) => {
  // ...
}
```

```html
interface FormFieldProps {
  field: FieldConfig;
  value: any;
  onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void;
  error: string | null;
  formData: FormState;
}

const FormField: React.FC<FormFieldProps> = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }) => {
  // React.FC automatically includes key, ref, children
}
```

```ts
interface FormFieldProps {
  field: FieldConfig;
  value: any;
  onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void;
  error: string | null;
  formData: FormState;
}
```

```html
const FormField = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }: 
  Partial<React.Attributes> & {
    field: FieldConfig;
    value: any;
    onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void;
    error: string | null;
    formData: FormState;
  }
) => {
  // ...
}
```

**AANBEVOLEN FIX: Optie C** (React.FC)
- Meest standaard React + TypeScript pattern
- Automatisch correct met key, ref, children
- Clean en readable

### **FOUT 3: React Hook useEffect missing dependency 'state' (Line 933)**

**Foutmelding:**
```
React Hook React.useEffect has a missing dependency: 'state'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps)
```

```ts
const FormField = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }: 
  Partial<React.Attributes> & {
    field: FieldConfig;
    value: any;
    onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void;
    error: string | null;
    formData: FormState;
  }
) => {
  // ...
}
```

**AANBEVOLEN FIX: Optie C** (React.FC)
- Meest standaard React + TypeScript pattern
- Automatisch correct met key, ref, children
- Clean en readable

### **FOUT 3: React Hook useEffect missing dependency 'state' (Line 933)**

**Foutmelding:**
```
React Hook React.useEffect has a missing dependency: 'state'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps)
```

```
React.useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state); // state gebruikt
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  loadSummary();
}, []); // state ontbreekt in deps
```

```ts
React.useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state); // state gebruikt
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  loadSummary();
}, []); // state ontbreekt in deps
```

```
// Developer intent: Run ONCE on mount
React.useEffect(() => {
  const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state); // Uses initial state snapshot
}, []); // ⚠️ ESLint warns, but maybe intentional
```

```ts
// Developer intent: Run ONCE on mount
React.useEffect(() => {
  const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state); // Uses initial state snapshot
}, []); // ⚠️ ESLint warns, but maybe intentional
```

```
// User navigates: C1 → C4 → C7 → C10 → Dashboard
// Dashboard mounts with state = { C1: {...}, C4: {...}, C7: {...}, C10: {...} }
// Effect runs, calls P6 with complete state ✅

// LATER: User clicks "Terug" and changes C7 data
// Dashboard stays mounted, state updates to new values
// Effect DOESN'T re-run because deps = []
// Dashboard shows OLD calculation ❌
```

```ts
// User navigates: C1 → C4 → C7 → C10 → Dashboard
// Dashboard mounts with state = { C1: {...}, C4: {...}, C7: {...}, C10: {...} }
// Effect runs, calls P6 with complete state ✅

// LATER: User clicks "Terug" and changes C7 data
// Dashboard stays mounted, state updates to new values
// Effect DOESN'T re-run because deps = []
// Dashboard shows OLD calculation ❌
```

```
React.useEffect(() => {
  const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
  setSummary(result); // Updates local state
}, [state]); // state is object reference

// Object reference changes → Effect runs → setSummary → Parent re-renders
// → Dashboard re-mounts → state object recreated → Effect runs → Loop! 🔄
```

```ts
React.useEffect(() => {
  const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
  setSummary(result); // Updates local state
}, [state]); // state is object reference

// Object reference changes → Effect runs → setSummary → Parent re-renders
// → Dashboard re-mounts → state object recreated → Effect runs → Loop! 🔄
```

```
React.useEffect(() => {
  // Capture state at mount time
  const stateSnapshot = state;
  
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(stateSnapshot);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  
  loadSummary();
  // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
}, []); // Explicitly ignore warning, documented reason
```

```ts
React.useEffect(() => {
  // Capture state at mount time
  const stateSnapshot = state;
  
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(stateSnapshot);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  
  loadSummary();
  // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
}, []); // Explicitly ignore warning, documented reason
```

```
React.useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  
  loadSummary();
}, [state.C7, state.C10, state.userId]); // Only relevant data
```

```ts
React.useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  
  loadSummary();
}, [state.C7, state.C10, state.userId]); // Only relevant data
```

```
const summary = React.useMemo(() => {
  // Synchronous calculation, no async needed
  const inkomenTotaalMaand = 
    (state.C7?.nettoMaandsalaris || 0) + 
    (state.C7?.huurtoeslag || 0);
  
  const lastenTotaalVast = 
    (state.C10?.wonen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.energie || 0) +
    (state.C10?.verzekeringen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.abonnementen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.overig || 0);
  
  const cashflowNetto = inkomenTotaalMaand - lastenTotaalVast;
  
  return {
    inkomenTotaalMaand,
    lastenTotaalVast,
    cashflowNetto
  };
}, [state.C7, state.C10]); // Auto-recalculates when financial data changes
```

```ts
const summary = React.useMemo(() => {
  // Synchronous calculation, no async needed
  const inkomenTotaalMaand = 
    (state.C7?.nettoMaandsalaris || 0) + 
    (state.C7?.huurtoeslag || 0);
  
  const lastenTotaalVast = 
    (state.C10?.wonen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.energie || 0) +
    (state.C10?.verzekeringen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.abonnementen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.overig || 0);
  
  const cashflowNetto = inkomenTotaalMaand - lastenTotaalVast;
  
  return {
    inkomenTotaalMaand,
    lastenTotaalVast,
    cashflowNetto
  };
}, [state.C7, state.C10]); // Auto-recalculates when financial data changes
```

```js
const loadSummary = React.useCallback(async () => {
  const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
  setSummary(result.financialSummary);
}, [state]); // Memoized function

React.useEffect(() => {
  loadSummary();
}, [loadSummary]); // Stable reference
```

```ts
const loadSummary = React.useCallback(async () => {
  const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
  setSummary(result.financialSummary);
}, [state]); // Memoized function

React.useEffect(() => {
  loadSummary();
}, [loadSummary]); // Stable reference
```

```
const stateRef = React.useRef(state);

| stateRef.current = state | // Always current |
| --- | --- |
| }, [state]) |  |

React.useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(stateRef.current);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  
  loadSummary();
}, []); // Mount-only, but ref always current
```

**AANBEVOLEN FIX: Optie C** (useMemo)
- Mock P6 is synchronous calculation anyway
- No need for async/await and loading state
- Auto-updates when financial data changes
- Most performant and correct

**Als async echt nodig is: Optie B** (Specific deps)

```ts
const FormProvider = ({ children }: { children?: React.ReactNode }) => {
  // ❌ BAD: Provider without children is useless
}
```

```js
const FormProvider = ({ children }: React.PropsWithChildren) => {
  const [state, dispatch] = React.useReducer(formReducer, {} as FormState);
  
  return (
    <FormContext.Provider value={{ state, dispatch }}>
      {children}
    </FormContext.Provider>
  );
};

// Usage blijft hetzelfde
export default function Root() {
  return (
    <FormProvider>
      <App />
    </FormProvider>
  );
}
```

```ts
const FormProvider = ({ children }: React.PropsWithChildren) => {
  const [state, dispatch] = React.useReducer(formReducer, {} as FormState);
  
  return (
    <FormContext.Provider value={{ state, dispatch }}>
      {children}
    </FormContext.Provider>
  );
};

// Usage blijft hetzelfde
export default function Root() {
  return (
    <FormProvider>
      <App />
    </FormProvider>
  );
}
```

```
React.PropsWithChildren
```

- React Native is voor mobile apps (iOS/Android)
- HTML elements zoals <select>, <option>, <div>, <span> bestaan niet in React Native
- Je gebruikt web-only HTML elements in een React Native context

- React Native Documentation

| Quote: "React Native doesn't use HTML or web views. Instead | messages from the JavaScript thread are used to manipulate native views." |
| --- | --- |

| Definieert alleen: View | Text | TextInput | ScrollView | etc. |

## ANALYSE VAN FOUTMELDINGEN

### FOUT 1: JSX element implicitly has type 'any' (Lines 525-538)

## SAMENVATTING FIXES

Ik ga elke foutmelding analyseren met best practices en bronnen.

Foutmelding:

Wat is het probleem?
React Native heeft geen native <select> en <option> HTML elements. TypeScript kan deze niet vinden in de React Native type definitions.
Waarom gebeurt dit?

Best Practices (Bronnen):

Oplossingen:
Optie A: Type Assertions (Quick Fix)
typescript
Optie B: Install react-native-web types (Proper Fix)
bash
Voeg toe aan :
json
Optie C: Create custom types (Most Robust)
typescript
Optie D: Platform-specific rendering (Production Ready)
typescript
Wat is het probleem?
De key prop wordt door React gebruikt maar staat niet in de TypeScript interface definitie van component props.
Best Practices (Bronnen):

Waarom gebeurt dit?
TypeScript probeert key te matchen met de component props interface, maar key is een React-internal prop.
Oplossingen:
Optie A: Voeg React.Key toe aan props interface
typescript
Optie B: Extend React.Attributes (Correct Method)
typescript
Optie C: Use React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef (Best Practice)
typescript
Optie D: Inline type met Partial React.Attributes (Quick Fix)
typescript
Wat is het probleem?
ESLint detecteert dat state wordt gebruikt in de effect maar niet in de dependency array.
Code:
typescript
Best Practices (Bronnen):

Waarom is dit problematisch?
Scenario 1: Mount-only intended
typescript
Scenario 2: Stale closure bug
typescript
Scenario 3: Infinite loop
typescript
Oplossingen:
Optie A: Capture state snapshot on mount (Original intent)
typescript
Optie B: Depend on specific state slices (Precise deps)
typescript
Optie C: useMemo for derived data (Best Practice)
typescript
Optie D: useCallback + useEffect (Complex async)
typescript
Optie E: Ref for mount-only access (Advanced)
typescript
Wat is het probleem?
 verwacht een children prop, maar  heeft geen children in de Root component.
Code:
typescript
Wacht... dit ZOU moeten werken!
Let me check... AH! Ik zie het probleem:
In de rewrite heb ik per ongeluk de children structure verwijderd bij het updaten. De <App /> moet BINNEN  tags staan.
Best Practices (Bronnen):

Oplossingen:
Optie A: Fix de structure (Correcte fix)
typescript
Optie B: Make children optional (Wrong approach)
typescript
Optie C: Use React.PropsWithChildren (Modern React 18+)

**Claude:**

```html
// Forceer TypeScript om HTML elements te accepteren
{field.type === 'select' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    {/* @ts-ignore - HTML select only works on web via react-native-web */}
    <select
      style={styles.select as any}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}
```

**Claude:**

```html
// Voeg toe boven in bestand:
declare global {
  namespace JSX {
    interface IntrinsicElements {
      select: React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.SelectHTMLAttributes<HTMLSelectElement>, HTMLSelectElement>;
      option: React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.OptionHTMLAttributes<HTMLOptionElement>, HTMLOptionElement>;
    }
  }
}
```

```ts
// Voeg toe boven in bestand:
declare global {
  namespace JSX {
    interface IntrinsicElements {
      select: React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.SelectHTMLAttributes<HTMLSelectElement>, HTMLSelectElement>;
      option: React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.OptionHTMLAttributes<HTMLOptionElement>, HTMLOptionElement>;
    }
  }
}
```

**Claude:**

```html
import { Platform } from 'react-native';

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS === 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select as any}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  // Use @react-native-picker/picker for native
  <Text>Native picker not implemented yet</Text>
)}
```

**AANBEVOLEN FIX: Optie C** (Custom types declaration)
- Minimalistische oplossing
- Documenteert web-only dependency
- Geen extra packages nodig

```
const FormField = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }: 
```
```html
  Partial<React.Attributes> & {
    field: FieldConfig;
    value: any;
    onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void;
    error: string | null;
    formData: FormState;
  }
) => {
  // ...
}
```

**AANBEVOLEN FIX: Optie C** (React.FC)
- Meest standaard React + TypeScript pattern
- Automatisch correct met key, ref, children
- Clean en readable

**Claude:**

```
React.useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state); // state gebruikt
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  loadSummary();
}, []); // state ontbreekt in deps
```

**Claude:**

```
// User navigates: C1 → C4 → C7 → C10 → Dashboard
// Dashboard mounts with state = { C1: {...}, C4: {...}, C7: {...}, C10: {...} }
// Effect runs, calls P6 with complete state ✅

// LATER: User clicks "Terug" and changes C7 data
// Dashboard stays mounted, state updates to new values
// Effect DOESN'T re-run because deps = []
// Dashboard shows OLD calculation ❌
```

```ts

```

---

**Claude:**

```
React.useEffect(() => {
  const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
  setSummary(result); // Updates local state
}, [state]); // state is object reference

// Object reference changes → Effect runs → setSummary → Parent re-renders
// → Dashboard re-mounts → state object recreated → Effect runs → Loop! 🔄
```

```ts
React.useEffect(() => {
  const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
  setSummary(result); // Updates local state
}, [state]); // state is object reference

// Object reference changes → Effect runs → setSummary → Parent re-renders
// → Dashboard re-mounts → state object recreated → Effect runs → Loop! 🔄
```

```
React.useEffect(() => {
```
```
  // Capture state at mount time
  const stateSnapshot = state;
  
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(stateSnapshot);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  
  loadSummary();
  // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
}, []); // Explicitly ignore warning, documented reason
```

---

**Claude:**

```
const summary = React.useMemo(() => {
  // Synchronous calculation, no async needed
  const inkomenTotaalMaand = 
    (state.C7?.nettoMaandsalaris || 0) + 
    (state.C7?.huurtoeslag || 0);
  
  const lastenTotaalVast = 
    (state.C10?.wonen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.energie || 0) +
    (state.C10?.verzekeringen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.abonnementen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.overig || 0);
  
  const cashflowNetto = inkomenTotaalMaand - lastenTotaalVast;
  
  return {
    inkomenTotaalMaand,
    lastenTotaalVast,
    cashflowNetto
  };
}, [state.C7, state.C10]); // Auto-recalculates when financial data changes
```

```ts

  // Synchronous calculation, no async needed

  const lastenTotaalVast = 
    (state.C10?.wonen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.energie || 0) +
    (state.C10?.verzekeringen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.abonnementen || 0) +
    (state.C10?.overig || 0);
  
  const cashflowNetto = inkomenTotaalMaand - lastenTotaalVast;
  
  return {
    inkomenTotaalMaand,
    lastenTotaalVast,
    cashflowNetto
  };
}, [state.C7, state.C10]); // Auto-recalculates when financial data changes
```

```js
  const result = await mockN8n.callP6(state);
  setSummary(result.financialSummary);
}, [state]); // Memoized function

  loadSummary();
}, [loadSummary]); // Stable reference
```

**Claude:**

```
const stateRef = React.useRef(state);

| stateRef.current = state | // Always current |
| --- | --- |
| }, [state]) |  |

React.useEffect(() => {
  const loadSummary = async () => {
    const result = await mockN8n.callP6(stateRef.current);
    setSummary(result.financialSummary);
  };
  
  loadSummary();
}, []); // Mount-only, but ref always current
```

**AANBEVOLEN FIX: Optie C** (useMemo)
- Mock P6 is synchronous calculation anyway
- No need for async/await and loading state
- Auto-updates when financial data changes
- Most performant and correct

**Als async echt nodig is: Optie B** (Specific deps)

**Claude:**

```js
const FormProvider = ({ children }: React.PropsWithChildren) => {
  const [state, dispatch] = React.useReducer(formReducer, {} as FormState);
  
  return (
    <FormContext.Provider value={{ state, dispatch }}>
      {children}
    </FormContext.Provider>
  );
};

// Usage blijft hetzelfde
export default function Root() {
  return (
    <FormProvider>
      <App />
    </FormProvider>
  );
}
```

```ts
  );
};

// Usage blijft hetzelfde

    <FormProvider>
      <App />
    </FormProvider>
  );
}
```

| 1 | 525-538 | Web HTML in React Native context | Custom JSX namespace declaration | HIGH |
| 2 | 617, 770, 787, 800, 817 | key prop niet in interface | Use React.FC<Props> | MEDIUM |
| 3 | 933 | Missing state dependency | Use useMemo for sync calculation | HIGH |
| 4 | 1403 | Missing children (structure error) | Verify <App /> inside <FormProvider> | CRITICAL |

### ✅ Fix 1: JSX IntrinsicElements (Lines 525-538)

**Claude:**

| ZONDER "GO": v12 niet wijzigen. Eerst meldingen analyseren en dan per melding: best practices opzoeken | source op internet raadplegen | uitleg geven | fix voorstellen. key={field.id} geeft fout: Type '{ key: string; field: FieldConfig; value: any; onChange: (id: string | value: any) => void; error: string \| null; formData: FormState; }' is not assignable to type 'FormFieldProps'. |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Property 'key' does not exist on type 'FormFieldProps'.(2322) komt voor op lijnen: 636 | 791 | 808 | 821 | 838 EN: |

---

**Claude:**

| Oplossing | Werkt Web | Werkt Native | Effort | Production Ready | Recommended |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| A: Platform.select + error | ✅ | ⚠️ (shows error) | 5 min | ❌ | Phase 1 POC |
| B: @react-native-picker/picker | ✅ | ✅ | 30 min | ✅ | YES ⭐ |
| C: Custom Modal | ✅ | ✅ | 2 hours | ✅ | Advanced |
| D: Platform files | ✅ | ✅ | 1 hour | ✅ | Large apps |

| Fout | Oorzaak | Impact | Recommended Fix | Effort |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| #1: key prop | React.FC includes children but NOT key | Type error | Extend React.Attributes | 5 min |
| #2: option crash | HTML elements don't exist in React Native | App crashes on native | Platform.select (POC) or @react-native-picker/picker (Prod) | 5-30 min |

```html
}
```

```ts
    propTypes?: WeakValidationMap<P> | undefined;
    contextTypes?: ValidationMap<any> | undefined;

}
```

```html
interface FormFieldProps extends React.Attributes {
  field: FieldConfig;
  value: any;
  onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void;
  error: string | null;
  formData: FormState;
}

const FormField: React.FC<FormFieldProps> = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }) => {
  // key is now in type but NOT in destructuring (React strips it)
}
```

```ts
interface FormFieldProps extends React.Attributes {
  field: FieldConfig;
  value: any;
  onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void;
  error: string | null;
  formData: FormState;
}

const FormField: React.FC<FormFieldProps> = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }) => {
  // key is now in type but NOT in destructuring (React strips it)
}
```

```
interface Attributes {
    key?: Key | null | undefined;
}
```

```ts
interface Attributes {
    key?: Key | null | undefined;
}
```

```html
// Create reusable helper type
type PropsWithKey<P> = P & React.Attributes;

| field: FieldConfig |  |
| --- | --- |
| value: any |  |
| onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void |  |
| error: string \| null |  |
| formData: FormState |  |

type FormFieldProps = PropsWithKey<FormFieldPropsBase>;

const FormField: React.FC<FormFieldProps> = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }) => {
  // ...
}
```

```ts
// Create reusable helper type
type PropsWithKey<P> = P & React.Attributes;

| field: FieldConfig |  |
| --- | --- |
| value: any |  |
| onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void |  |
| error: string \| null |  |
| formData: FormState |  |

type FormFieldProps = PropsWithKey<FormFieldPropsBase>;

const FormField: React.FC<FormFieldProps> = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }) => {
  // ...
}
```

```js
interface FormFieldProps {
  key?: React.Key; // Explicitly add
  field: FieldConfig;
  value: any;
  onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void;
  error: string | null;
  formData: FormState;
}
```

**Vergelijking:**

| Oplossing | Pro | Con | Recommended |
|-----------|-----|-----|-------------|
| A: Type assertion | Quick fix | Ugly, repetitive | ❌ |
| B: Extend Attributes | Clean, standard | Must extend each interface | ✅ **YES** |
| C: PropsWithKey helper | DRY, reusable | Extra abstraction | ✅ **BEST** |
| D: Manual key | Explicit | Manual, error-prone | ⚠️ OK |

### AANBEVOLEN FIX: **Optie B** (Extend React.Attributes)

Eenvoudig, standaard pattern, werkt voor alle components.

---

## **FOUT 2: View config getter callback for component `option` must be a function (Native Mobile)**

### Wat is het probleem?

**Foutmelding:**
```
View config getter callback for component `option` must be a function (received `undefined`). 
Make sure to start component names with a capital letter.
```

**Waar gebeurt dit?**
- ✅ **Werkt**: Expo web (browser)
- ❌ **Crasht**: Physical device via QR code

### Root Cause Analysis

**1. React Native vs React Native Web**

- Bron: [React Native Architecture](https://reactnative.dev/docs/intro-react-native-components)

**React Native (iOS/Android)**:
```
JavaScript Components → Native Bridge → UIKit/Android Views
```
- Heeft ALLEEN: `<View>`, `<Text>`, `<TextInput>`, `<ScrollView>`, etc.
- **GEEN HTML ELEMENTS**: `<div>`, `<select>`, `<option>`, `<span>`

**React Native Web**:
```
JavaScript Components → react-native-web → DOM (HTML)
```

```ts
interface FormFieldProps {
  key?: React.Key; // Explicitly add
  field: FieldConfig;
  value: any;
  onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void;
  error: string | null;
  formData: FormState;
}
```

**Vergelijking:**

| Oplossing | Pro | Con | Recommended |
|-----------|-----|-----|-------------|
| A: Type assertion | Quick fix | Ugly, repetitive | ❌ |
| B: Extend Attributes | Clean, standard | Must extend each interface | ✅ **YES** |
| C: PropsWithKey helper | DRY, reusable | Extra abstraction | ✅ **BEST** |
| D: Manual key | Explicit | Manual, error-prone | ⚠️ OK |

### AANBEVOLEN FIX: **Optie B** (Extend React.Attributes)

Eenvoudig, standaard pattern, werkt voor alle components.

---

## **FOUT 2: View config getter callback for component `option` must be a function (Native Mobile)**

### Wat is het probleem?

**Foutmelding:**
```
View config getter callback for component `option` must be a function (received `undefined`). 
Make sure to start component names with a capital letter.
```

**Waar gebeurt dit?**
- ✅ **Werkt**: Expo web (browser)
- ❌ **Crasht**: Physical device via QR code

### Root Cause Analysis

**1. React Native vs React Native Web**

- Bron: [React Native Architecture](https://reactnative.dev/docs/intro-react-native-components)

**React Native (iOS/Android)**:
```
JavaScript Components → Native Bridge → UIKit/Android Views
```
- Heeft ALLEEN: `<View>`, `<Text>`, `<TextInput>`, `<ScrollView>`, etc.
- **GEEN HTML ELEMENTS**: `<div>`, `<select>`, `<option>`, `<span>`

**React Native Web**:
```
JavaScript Components → react-native-web → DOM (HTML)
```

```js
{field.type === 'select' && (
  <View style={...}>
    <select>  {/* ❌ HTML element */}
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}
```

**Op Web**: ✅ Werkt
- Browser begrijpt native HTML `<select>` en `<option>`

**Op Native**: ❌ Crasht
- React Native zoekt `ViewConfig` voor component "option"
- ViewConfig = instructions hoe component moet renderen
- Bestaat alleen voor React Native components
- HTML elements hebben geen ViewConfig
- **Result**: `undefined` → Crash

**3. Error Message Breakdown**
```
View config getter callback for component `option` must be a function (received `undefined`)
```

```ts
{field.type === 'select' && (
  <View style={...}>
    <select>  {/* ❌ HTML element */}
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}
```

**Op Web**: ✅ Werkt
- Browser begrijpt native HTML `<select>` en `<option>`

**Op Native**: ❌ Crasht
- React Native zoekt `ViewConfig` voor component "option"
- ViewConfig = instructions hoe component moet renderen
- Bestaat alleen voor React Native components
- HTML elements hebben geen ViewConfig
- **Result**: `undefined` → Crash

**3. Error Message Breakdown**
```
View config getter callback for component `option` must be a function (received `undefined`)
```

```
import { Platform } from 'react-native';

if (Platform.OS === 'web') {
  // Use web-specific code
} else {
  // Use native code
}
```

```ts
import { Platform } from 'react-native';

if (Platform.OS === 'web') {
  // Use web-specific code
} else {
  // Use native code
}
```

```html
import { Platform } from 'react-native';

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS === 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  <View style={styles.fieldContainer}>
    <Text style={styles.fieldLabel}>
      {displayLabel} (Native picker not implemented yet)
    </Text>
    <Text style={styles.errorText}>
      Please use web version for now
    </Text>
  </View>
)}
```

```ts

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS === 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  <View style={styles.fieldContainer}>
    <Text style={styles.fieldLabel}>
      {displayLabel} (Native picker not implemented yet)
    </Text>
    <Text style={styles.errorText}>
      Please use web version for now
    </Text>
  </View>
)}
```

```
npx expo install @react-native-picker/picker
```

```bash
npx expo install @react-native-picker/picker
```

```html
import { Picker } from '@react-native-picker/picker';
import { Platform } from 'react-native';

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS === 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <Picker
      selectedValue={value || ''}
      onValueChange={(itemValue) => handleChange(itemValue)}
      style={styles.picker}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <Picker.Item key={opt.value} label={opt.label} value={opt.value} />
      ))}
    </Picker>
  </View>
)}
```

```ts
import { Picker } from '@react-native-picker/picker';
import { Platform } from 'react-native';

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS === 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <Picker
      selectedValue={value || ''}
      onValueChange={(itemValue) => handleChange(itemValue)}
      style={styles.picker}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <Picker.Item key={opt.value} label={opt.label} value={opt.value} />
      ))}
    </Picker>
  </View>
)}
```

```html
import { Modal, FlatList, Pressable } from 'react-native';

| const [modalVisible, setModalVisible] = React.useState(false) |  |
| --- | --- |
| const selectedOption = options?.find((opt: any) => opt.value === value) |  |
| onChange(item.value) |  |
| setModalVisible(false) |  |
| ) |  |
| } |  |

// Usage:
{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  <NativePicker
    options={field.options}
    value={value}
    onChange={handleChange}
    label={displayLabel}
  />
)}
```

| **Pro**: Complete customization | no dependencies |
| --- | --- |
| **Con**: More code | need to maintain |

---

**Optie D: Platform-specific files** ⭐ **SCALABLE**

Create separate files:
```
FormField.web.tsx    // Uses HTML <select>
FormField.native.tsx // Uses Picker or custom
FormField.tsx        // Shared logic
```

```ts
import { Modal, FlatList, Pressable } from 'react-native';

| const [modalVisible, setModalVisible] = React.useState(false) |  |
| --- | --- |
| const selectedOption = options?.find((opt: any) => opt.value === value) |  |
| onChange(item.value) |  |
| setModalVisible(false) |  |
| ) |  |
| } |  |

// Usage:
{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  <NativePicker
    options={field.options}
    value={value}
    onChange={handleChange}
    label={displayLabel}
  />
)}
```

| **Pro**: Complete customization | no dependencies |
| --- | --- |
| **Con**: More code | need to maintain |

---

**Optie D: Platform-specific files** ⭐ **SCALABLE**

Create separate files:
```
FormField.web.tsx    // Uses HTML <select>
FormField.native.tsx // Uses Picker or custom
FormField.tsx        // Shared logic
```

```html
// FormField.web.tsx
export const SelectField = ({ field, value, onChange, error }: any) => (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => onChange(e.target.value)}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
);

// FormField.native.tsx
import { Picker } from '@react-native-picker/picker';

export const SelectField = ({ field, value, onChange, error }: any) => (
  <View style={[styles.input, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <Picker
      selectedValue={value || ''}
      onValueChange={(itemValue) => onChange(itemValue)}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <Picker.Item key={opt.value} label={opt.label} value={opt.value} />
      ))}
    </Picker>
  </View>
);

// FormField.tsx
import { SelectField } from './FormField'; // Auto-resolves .web or .native

export const FormField = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }) => {
  // ...
  {field.type === 'select' && (
    <SelectField field={field} value={value} onChange={handleChange} error={error} />
  )}
}
```

```ts
// FormField.web.tsx
export const SelectField = ({ field, value, onChange, error }: any) => (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => onChange(e.target.value)}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
);

// FormField.native.tsx
import { Picker } from '@react-native-picker/picker';

export const SelectField = ({ field, value, onChange, error }: any) => (
  <View style={[styles.input, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <Picker
      selectedValue={value || ''}
      onValueChange={(itemValue) => onChange(itemValue)}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <Picker.Item key={opt.value} label={opt.label} value={opt.value} />
      ))}
    </Picker>
  </View>
);

// FormField.tsx
import { SelectField } from './FormField'; // Auto-resolves .web or .native

export const FormField = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }) => {
  // ...
  {field.type === 'select' && (
    <SelectField field={field} value={value} onChange={handleChange} error={error} />
  )}
}
```

| Quote | "Keys are not passed to your components. If you need the same value in your component, pass it explicitly as a prop with a different name" |

| Key | Value |

| Verklaring | key is een special React prop die: |

```html
| error: string \| null |  |
| formData: FormState |  |

type FormFieldProps = PropsWithKey<FormFieldPropsBase>;

const FormField: React.FC<FormFieldProps> = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }) => {
  // ...
}
```

```ts
// Create reusable helper type
type PropsWithKey<P> = P & React.Attributes;

| field: FieldConfig |  |
| --- | --- |
| value: any |  |
| onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void |  |
| error: string \| null |  |
| formData: FormState |  |

  // ...
```

**Claude:**

```html
// Create reusable helper type
type PropsWithKey<P> = P & React.Attributes;

| field: FieldConfig |  |
| --- | --- |
| value: any |  |
| onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void |  |
| error: string \| null |  |
| formData: FormState |  |
```

```ts
// Create reusable helper type
type PropsWithKey<P> = P & React.Attributes;

| field: FieldConfig |  |
| --- | --- |
| value: any |  |
| onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void |  |
| error: string \| null |  |
| formData: FormState |  |

}
```

---

**Claude:**

```js
interface FormFieldProps {
  key?: React.Key; // Explicitly add
  field: FieldConfig;
  value: any;
  onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void;
  error: string | null;
  formData: FormState;
}
```

**Vergelijking:**

| Oplossing | Pro | Con | Recommended |
|-----------|-----|-----|-------------|
| A: Type assertion | Quick fix | Ugly, repetitive | ❌ |
| B: Extend Attributes | Clean, standard | Must extend each interface | ✅ **YES** |
| C: PropsWithKey helper | DRY, reusable | Extra abstraction | ✅ **BEST** |
| D: Manual key | Explicit | Manual, error-prone | ⚠️ OK |

### AANBEVOLEN FIX: **Optie B** (Extend React.Attributes)

Eenvoudig, standaard pattern, werkt voor alle components.

---

## **FOUT 2: View config getter callback for component `option` must be a function (Native Mobile)**

### Wat is het probleem?

**Foutmelding:**
```
View config getter callback for component `option` must be a function (received `undefined`). 
Make sure to start component names with a capital letter.
```

**Waar gebeurt dit?**
- ✅ **Werkt**: Expo web (browser)
- ❌ **Crasht**: Physical device via QR code

### Root Cause Analysis

**1. React Native vs React Native Web**

- Bron: [React Native Architecture](https://reactnative.dev/docs/intro-react-native-components)

**React Native (iOS/Android)**:
```
JavaScript Components → Native Bridge → UIKit/Android Views
```
- Heeft ALLEEN: `<View>`, `<Text>`, `<TextInput>`, `<ScrollView>`, etc.
- **GEEN HTML ELEMENTS**: `<div>`, `<select>`, `<option>`, `<span>`

**React Native Web**:
```
JavaScript Components → react-native-web → DOM (HTML)
```

```ts
interface FormFieldProps {
  key?: React.Key; // Explicitly add
  field: FieldConfig;
  value: any;
  onChange: (fieldId: string, value: any) => void;
  error: string | null;
  formData: FormState;
}
```

**Vergelijking:**

| Oplossing | Pro | Con | Recommended |
|-----------|-----|-----|-------------|
| A: Type assertion | Quick fix | Ugly, repetitive | ❌ |
| B: Extend Attributes | Clean, standard | Must extend each interface | ✅ **YES** |
| C: PropsWithKey helper | DRY, reusable | Extra abstraction | ✅ **BEST** |
| D: Manual key | Explicit | Manual, error-prone | ⚠️ OK |

### AANBEVOLEN FIX: **Optie B** (Extend React.Attributes)

Eenvoudig, standaard pattern, werkt voor alle components.

---

## **FOUT 2: View config getter callback for component `option` must be a function (Native Mobile)**

### Wat is het probleem?

**Foutmelding:**
```
View config getter callback for component `option` must be a function (received `undefined`). 
Make sure to start component names with a capital letter.
```

**Waar gebeurt dit?**
- ✅ **Werkt**: Expo web (browser)
- ❌ **Crasht**: Physical device via QR code

### Root Cause Analysis

**1. React Native vs React Native Web**

- Bron: [React Native Architecture](https://reactnative.dev/docs/intro-react-native-components)

**React Native (iOS/Android)**:
```
JavaScript Components → Native Bridge → UIKit/Android Views
```
- Heeft ALLEEN: `<View>`, `<Text>`, `<TextInput>`, `<ScrollView>`, etc.
- **GEEN HTML ELEMENTS**: `<div>`, `<select>`, `<option>`, `<span>`

**React Native Web**:
```
JavaScript Components → react-native-web → DOM (HTML)
```

---

**Claude:**

```js
{field.type === 'select' && (
  <View style={...}>
    <select>  {/* ❌ HTML element */}
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}
```

**Op Web**: ✅ Werkt
- Browser begrijpt native HTML `<select>` en `<option>`

**Op Native**: ❌ Crasht
- React Native zoekt `ViewConfig` voor component "option"
- ViewConfig = instructions hoe component moet renderen
- Bestaat alleen voor React Native components
- HTML elements hebben geen ViewConfig
- **Result**: `undefined` → Crash

**3. Error Message Breakdown**
```
View config getter callback for component `option` must be a function (received `undefined`)
```

```ts

  <View style={...}>
    <select>  {/* ❌ HTML element */}

      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}
```

**Claude:**

```html
import { Picker } from '@react-native-picker/picker';
import { Platform } from 'react-native';

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS === 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <Picker
      selectedValue={value || ''}
      onValueChange={(itemValue) => handleChange(itemValue)}
      style={styles.picker}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <Picker.Item key={opt.value} label={opt.label} value={opt.value} />
      ))}
    </Picker>
  </View>
)}
```

```ts
import { Picker } from '@react-native-picker/picker';
import { Platform } from 'react-native';

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS === 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <Picker
      selectedValue={value || ''}
      onValueChange={(itemValue) => handleChange(itemValue)}
      style={styles.picker}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <Picker.Item key={opt.value} label={opt.label} value={opt.value} />
      ))}
    </Picker>
  </View>
)}
```

```html
    <select
      style={styles.select}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <Picker
      selectedValue={value || ''}
      onValueChange={(itemValue) => handleChange(itemValue)}
      style={styles.picker}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <Picker.Item key={opt.value} label={opt.label} value={opt.value} />
      ))}
    </Picker>
  </View>
)}
```

```ts
import { Picker } from '@react-native-picker/picker';
import { Platform } from 'react-native';

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS === 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => handleChange(e.target.value)}
      aria-label={displayLabel}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
)}

{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  <View style={[styles.input, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <Picker
      selectedValue={value || ''}
      onValueChange={(itemValue) => handleChange(itemValue)}
      style={styles.picker}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <Picker.Item key={opt.value} label={opt.label} value={opt.value} />
      ))}
    </Picker>
  </View>
)}
```

---

**Claude:**

```html
import { Modal, FlatList, Pressable } from 'react-native';

| const [modalVisible, setModalVisible] = React.useState(false) |  |
| --- | --- |
| const selectedOption = options?.find((opt: any) => opt.value === value) |  |
| onChange(item.value) |  |
| setModalVisible(false) |  |
| ) |  |
| } |  |

// Usage:
{field.type === 'select' && Platform.OS !== 'web' && (
  <NativePicker
    options={field.options}
    value={value}
    onChange={handleChange}
    label={displayLabel}
  />
)}
```

| **Pro**: Complete customization | no dependencies |
| --- | --- |
| **Con**: More code | need to maintain |

```
FormField.tsx        // Shared logic
```

**Claude:**

```html
// FormField.web.tsx
export const SelectField = ({ field, value, onChange, error }: any) => (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => onChange(e.target.value)}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>
      ))}
    </select>
  </View>
);

// FormField.native.tsx
import { Picker } from '@react-native-picker/picker';

export const SelectField = ({ field, value, onChange, error }: any) => (
  <View style={[styles.input, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <Picker
      selectedValue={value || ''}
      onValueChange={(itemValue) => onChange(itemValue)}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
        <Picker.Item key={opt.value} label={opt.label} value={opt.value} />
      ))}
    </Picker>
  </View>
);

// FormField.tsx
import { SelectField } from './FormField'; // Auto-resolves .web or .native

export const FormField = ({ field, value, onChange, error, formData }) => {
  // ...
  {field.type === 'select' && (
    <SelectField field={field} value={value} onChange={handleChange} error={error} />
  )}
}
```

```ts
      onChange={(e: any) => onChange(e.target.value)}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (

      ))}
    </select>

);

    <SelectField field={field} value={value} onChange={handleChange} error={error} />
  )}
}
```

```html
// FormField.web.tsx
export const SelectField = ({ field, value, onChange, error }: any) => (
  <View style={[styles.input, styles.selectContainer, error && styles.inputError]}>
    <select
      style={styles.select}
      value={value || ''}
      onChange={(e: any) => onChange(e.target.value)}
    >
      {field.options?.map(opt => (
```

---

**Claude:**

| Oplossing | Werkt Web | Werkt Native | Effort | Production Ready | Recommended |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| A: Platform.select + error | ✅ | ⚠️ (shows error) | 5 min | ❌ | Phase 1 POC |
| B: @react-native-picker/picker | ✅ | ✅ | 30 min | ✅ | YES ⭐ |
| C: Custom Modal | ✅ | ✅ | 2 hours | ✅ | Advanced |
| D: Platform files | ✅ | ✅ | 1 hour | ✅ | Large apps |

---

**Claude:**

| Fout | Oorzaak | Impact | Recommended Fix | Effort |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| #1: key prop | React.FC includes children but NOT key | Type error | Extend React.Attributes | 5 min |
| #2: option crash | HTML elements don't exist in React Native | App crashes on native | Platform.select (POC) or @react-native-picker/picker (Prod) | 5-30 min |

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Platform import from 'react | native' |
| Platform | specific rendering voor select fields: |

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Web (Platform.OS === 'web') | Gebruikt HTML <select> en <option> (werkt zoals voorheen) |
| Native (Platform.OS !== 'web') | Toont vriendelijke placeholder met boodschap: |
| Web (Platform.OS === 'web') | Gebruikt HTML <select> en <option> (werkt zoals voorheen) |
| Native (Platform.OS !== 'web') | Toont vriendelijke placeholder met boodschap: |

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Web (Platform.OS === 'web') | Gebruikt HTML <select> en <option> (werkt zoals voorheen) |
| Native (Platform.OS !== 'web') | Toont vriendelijke placeholder met boodschap: |

- Nieuwe styles voor native placeholder:

: Gele achtergrond (#FFF3CD) met oranje border
: Bold hoofdtekst
: Kleinere subtekst

- : Bold hoofdtekst

| Key | Value |

- ✅ App crasht niet meer op fysiek apparaat
- ✅ User krijgt duidelijke feedback waarom dropdown niet werkt
- ✅ Web functionaliteit blijft volledig intact
- ✅ Voorbereiding voor Phase 2 (vervang placeholder door @react-native-picker/picker)

- ✅ Dropdowns werken normaal (C1: Woonsituatie, C4: Burgerlijke staat)
- ✅ Geen visual changes

- ✅ App start zonder crash
- ✅ "Aanmelden" button werkt
- ✅ C1 page toont gele warning boxes voor dropdowns
- ✅ User kan flow niet voltooien (select fields required maar disabled)
- ⚠️ Expected limitation: Native users moeten web versie gebruiken

- Vervang native placeholder door  implementatie
- Zie FUTURE_ENHANCEMENTS.md § "Native select (NOT applied)"

```html
// ❌ VERWIJDER dit hele blok (niet meer nodig)
declare global {
  namespace JSX {
    interface IntrinsicElements {
      select: React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.SelectHTMLAttributes<HTMLSelectElement>, HTMLSelectElement>;
      option: React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.OptionHTMLAttributes<HTMLOptionElement>, HTMLOptionElement>;
    }
  }
}
```

```ts
// ❌ VERWIJDER dit hele blok (niet meer nodig)
declare global {
  namespace JSX {
    interface IntrinsicElements {
      select: React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.SelectHTMLAttributes<HTMLSelectElement>, HTMLSelectElement>;
      option: React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.OptionHTMLAttributes<HTMLOptionElement>, HTMLOptionElement>;
    }
  }
}
```

```json
{field.type === 'select' && (
  <View style={styles.radioGroup}>
    {field.options?.map(opt => {
      // Skip "Selecteer..." placeholder option
      if (opt.value === '') return null;
      
      const isSelected = value === opt.value;
      
      return (
        <TouchableOpacity
          key={opt.value}
          style={[
            styles.radioButton,
            isSelected && styles.radioButtonSelected,
            error && styles.radioButtonError
          ]}
          onPress={() => handleChange(opt.value)}
          accessibilityRole="radio"
          accessibilityState={{ checked: isSelected }}
          accessibilityLabel={opt.label}
        >
          <View style={[
            styles.radioCircle,
            isSelected && styles.radioCircleSelected
          ]}>
            {isSelected && <View style={styles.radioCircleInner} />}
          </View>
          <Text style={[
            styles.radioLabel,
            isSelected && styles.radioLabelSelected
          ]}>
            {opt.label}
          </Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
      );
    })}
  </View>
)}
```

```ts
{field.type === 'select' && (
  <View style={styles.radioGroup}>
    {field.options?.map(opt => {
      // Skip "Selecteer..." placeholder option
      if (opt.value === '') return null;
      
      const isSelected = value === opt.value;
      
      return (
        <TouchableOpacity
          key={opt.value}
          style={[
            styles.radioButton,
            isSelected && styles.radioButtonSelected,
            error && styles.radioButtonError
          ]}
          onPress={() => handleChange(opt.value)}
          accessibilityRole="radio"
          accessibilityState={{ checked: isSelected }}
          accessibilityLabel={opt.label}
        >
          <View style={[
            styles.radioCircle,
            isSelected && styles.radioCircleSelected
          ]}>
            {isSelected && <View style={styles.radioCircleInner} />}
          </View>
          <Text style={[
            styles.radioLabel,
            isSelected && styles.radioLabelSelected
          ]}>
            {opt.label}
          </Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
      );
    })}
  </View>
)}
```
